equip.desc:
Be it bustling, desolate, fleeting, or enduring... every planet and every instant is brimming with countless events.
That condensed history melts at a single touch, flowing as tears from the world's gaze—

Some say: How heavy those tears must be, the amassed years capable of fading eternity.
Some say: How wondrous the stories they tell, sorrow so clear, joy so serene, unmarred by even a hint of falsehood.

The Cosmos flows in silent stillness, and THEY speak not, only watching—
Watching and waiting for them to become "memories."
equip.name: Memory's Curtain Never Falls

skill_stages.desc: Deals 4 instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Ice DMG equal to 39.6% of Mem's ATK to one random enemy. At the end, deals Ice DMG equal to 99% of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Baddies! Trouble!

skill_stages.desc:
Advances the action of one designated ally by 100% and grants them "Mem's Support," lasting for 3 turn(s).
For every 1 instance of DMG dealt by a target that has "Mem's Support," additionally deals 1 instance of True DMG equal to 30% of the original DMG.
When using this ability on this unit, cannot trigger the action advance effect.
skill_stages.name: Lemme! Help You!

skill_stages.desc:
Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by an amount equal to 13.2% of Mem's CRIT DMG plus 26.4%.
If the Charge has yet to reach 100%, Mem automatically uses "Baddies! Trouble!" when taking action. When the Charge reaches 100%, Mem immediately takes action. In the next action, can select one ally and use "Lemme! Help You!".
skill_stages.name: Friends! Together!

skill_stages.desc: When Mem is summoned, immediately gains 50% Charge.
skill_stages.name: Go, Mem, Go!

skill_stages.desc: When Mem disappears, Trailblazer's action advances by 25%.
skill_stages.name: No... Regrets

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Insumousu Autonomous Region of Thalassa. The Xianzhou Daiyu had crashed here, inspiring the civilization of Insumousu.
ornaments.name: Insumousu's Whalefall Ship

ornaments.desc: The fallen Xianzhou Daiyu is forever anchored in a foreign land. Perhaps it is time to untie its mooring ropes and let it return home.
ornaments.name: Insumousu's Frayed Hawser

ranks.desc: Increases the CRIT Rate of ally targets with "Mem's Support" by 10%. When an ally target has "Mem's Support," the effect of "Mem's Support" also applies to the target's memosprite/memomaster. This effect cannot stack.
ranks.name: Narrator of the Present

ranks.desc: When ally memosprites (aside from Mem) take action, Trailblazer regenerates 8 Energy. This effect can trigger a max of 1 time(s) per turn. The trigger count resets at the start of Trailblazer's turn.
ranks.name: Gleaner of the Past

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Memosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Chanter of the Future

ranks.desc: When an ally target with 0 Max Energy actively uses an ability, Mem can also gain 3% Charge, and the multiplier of the True DMG dealt by this target via "Mem's Support" additionally increases by 6%.
ranks.name: Dancer of the Muse

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Memosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Seamster of the Ode

ranks.desc: Ultimate's CRIT Rate is set at 100%.
ranks.name: Bearer of the Revelation

relics.desc: The shape is exactly like a ski goggle. Not only does it have anti-glare properties, it can also be used to watch virtual live streams.
relics.name: Messenger's Holovisor

relics.desc: A cybernetic prosthetic arm that can be disassembled at will. Capable of firing knuckles like bullets.
relics.name: Messenger's Transformative Arm

relics.desc: He often stands before the dressing mirror, ensuring his attire is impeccable and his features perfect. Before he leaves the house, he will ensure that everything is meticulously arranged, and no deviations will occur.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Ceremonial Garb

relics.desc: He often chose boots that snugly embrace his feet before embarking on his journeys. Despite numerous falls, he rose each time.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Arduous Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 110% of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Leave It to Me!

skill_stages.desc: Consumes 1 stack of "Epic" to dispel all Crowd Control debuffs on Mem. Trailblazer and Mem launch a Joint ATK, dealing Ice DMG to all enemies equal to 132% of Trailblazer's ATK and 132% of Mem's ATK respectively. Then, Mem gains 10% Charge.
skill_stages.name: Together, We Script Tomorrow!

skill_stages.desc: Summons the memosprite Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP by an amount equal to 66% of Mem's Max HP, and grants Mem 10% Charge.
skill_stages.name: I Choose You!

skill_stages.desc: Summons memosprite Mem. Grants Mem 40% Charge, then makes Mem deal Ice DMG equal to 264% of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Together, Mem!

skill_stages.desc: Memosprite Mem has an initial SPD of 130 and a Max HP equal to 86% of Trailblazer's Max HP plus 688. For every 10 Energy regenerated by all allies in total, Mem gains 1% Charge.
skill_stages.name: Almighty Companion

skill_stages.desc:
After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for 10 second(s). Enemies within the Special Dimension are placed in a Time Stop state, halting all their actions.
After entering battle against enemies afflicted with the Time Stop state, delays the action of all enemies by 50%, and then deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to 100% of Trailblazer's ATK.
Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skill_stages.name: Memories Back as Echoes

skill_stages.desc: When the battle starts, Trailblazer's action advances by 30%. When Mem is first summoned, grants Mem 40% Charge.
skill_stages.name: Rhapsode's Scepter

skill_stages.desc: When using "Baddies! Trouble!," Mem immediately gains 5% Charge.
skill_stages.name: Petite Parable

skill_stages.desc: When the Max Energy of an ally target that has "Mem's Support" exceeds 100, for every 10 excess Energy, additionally increases the multiplier of the True DMG dealt via "Mem's Support" by 2%, up to a max increase of 20%.
skill_stages.name: Magnets and Long Chains

equip.desc: Once again, within the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, she watched as destiny intertwined like a shimmering web of pearls, reflecting and overlapping, with endless cause and effect. "What do you see?" Her master once asked her. Some diviners saw their own insignificance, and no longer believed that human effort could change destiny. Others saw the great tides of the future, following the flow to find optimal solutions. At that moment, the young girl gazed into the barrier, and saw boundless darkness. That is a future long predetermined. She also saw "starlight," the faint possibilities not yet devoured by the gods' gaze. That gleam of starlight once slipped through her fingers, leaving the Fanghu in eternal night. Yet she had also seized fleeting variables, flipping the Weal and Woe of the Yuque. "A dead end is called such only because none dare defy fate." She wanted to find her own answer, even if it meant stepping into destined peril. "What I see matters not. What matters is what I can do."
equip.name: When She Decided to See

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is a submerged city in the marine world Lushaka. The sea level rose to the point where even the city was drowned. Only gigantic "stateships" carrying their sailors chug along across the sea, in search of the direction for their next distant voyage.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Waterscape

ornaments.desc: On the boundless horizon, even the faintest mark can shatter this silence. The navigational lanes bear the history of the crew while the aqua sprites pursue hope along the water currents.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Twinlanes

ranks.desc: In Aha's extra turn triggered by Ultimate, the fixed amount of Punchline taken into account increases to 40. When dealing Elation DMG, all ally targets ignore 20% of the target's DEF.
ranks.name: Chuckle Chimes Where Jade Falls

ranks.desc: While the Zone is active, increases all ally targets' SPD by 12%, and additionally increases Elation by 16%.
ranks.name: Blind Arrows Guided by Feathers

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Auspices Mirrored In Decalight

ranks.desc: In Aha's extra turn triggered by Yao Guang's Ultimate, the DMG dealt by all ally characters' Elation Skill becomes 150% of the original DMG.
ranks.name: Threads of Fate Colored by Plumes

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Bejeweled in Radiant Grace

ranks.desc: All ally targets' Elation DMG merrymakes by 25%. Increases the DMG multiplier of Yao Guang's Elation Skill by 100% of its original multiplier.
ranks.name: Ferried Along the Astral Arc

relics.desc: The external jade abacus worn by Jingtian. Knowing well that human strength could never fathom fate, he used it to ceaselessly divine the future.
relics.name: Diviner's Extrapolation Jade Abacus

relics.desc: After losing an arm on the battlefield of Thalassa, Jingtian crafted himself a prosthetic arm, which was as cold and precise as his divinations.
relics.name: Diviner's Ingenium Prosthetic Hand

relics.desc: The standard-issue ritual robe of the Yuque Divination Commission is typically reserved for formal occasions. Due to its rare use, it still looks as good as new.
relics.name: Diviner's Astral Robe

relics.desc: Cloud boots crafted by Jingtian allowed him to fly onto battlefields and gather information. They are now displayed in the Yuque's Divination Commission, serving as a testament to future generations.
relics.name: Diviner's Cloud-Soaring Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to 90% of Yao Guang's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to 30% of Yao Guang's ATK to targets adjacent to it. The Energy regenerated from Basic ATK increases to 30.
skill_stages.name: Whistlebolt Sings Joy

skill_stages.desc: Deploys a Zone for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. While the Zone is active, increases all allies' Elation by an amount equal to 20.0% of Yao Guang's Elation. After Yao Guang uses Basic ATK or Skill, gains 3 Punchline.
skill_stages.name: Decalight Unveils All

skill_stages.desc: Gains 5 Punchline. Aha immediately gains 1 extra turn where a fixed amount of 20 Punchline is taken into account. This turn, does not consume Punchline, and increases all allies' All-Type RES PEN by 20.0% for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Hexagram of Feathered Fortune

skill_stages.desc:
While Yao Guang holds "Certified Banger":
After an ally target uses an attack, triggers the "Great Boon" effect, dealing 1 additional instance of 20.0% Elation DMG of the corresponding Type to 1 random hit target. If this attack consumes Skill Points, then additionally triggers "Great Boon" 1 time.
When triggering the "Great Boon" effect, if the attacker's Elation is lower than that of Yao Guang, then this instance of Elation DMG will take Yao Guang's Elation into calculation.
Triggering the "Great Boon" effect is not considered as using 1 instance of attack.
skill_stages.name: Behold Wherever Light Unfolds

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, automatically triggers Skill 1 time at the start of the next battle without consuming any Skill Points. When Yao Guang is in the team, breaking destructible objects immediately grants Fortune Pouch, up to 8 within every Earth Week.
skill_stages.name: Untethered Glimmer Sails Far

skill_stages.desc: When Yao Guang's SPD is 120 or higher, increases this unit's Elation by 30%. For every 1 SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by 1%. Up to a max of 200 excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.
skill_stages.name: Amaze-In Grace

skill_stages.desc: Increases this unit's CRIT DMG by 60%. After using Elation Skill, recovers 1 Skill Point(s) for the team.
skill_stages.name: Poised and Sated

skill_stages.desc: When Yao Guang gains "Certified Banger," its duration increases by 1 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Felicity Ensemble

skill_stages.desc: Inflicts "Woe's Whisper" on all enemies, lasting for 3 turn(s). Enemy targets under the "Woe's Whisper" state take 16.0% increased DMG. Deals 100% Physical Elation DMG to all enemies. Then, deals 5 instance(s) of 20% Physical Elation DMG to one random enemy.
skill_stages.name: Let Thy Fortune Burst in Flames

equip.desc: When she laughs, her fans laugh. When she cries, her fans shed tears. When she's angry, her fans rage. "Cute, playful, popular. Sparxie is everything I want to be..." "Don't be fooled, Sparxie is a poison, she's a lie..." "I'll follow Sparxicle forever, she gave me the courage for rebirth..." "Sparxie should vanish from this world!" ... Clicks, bullet comments, discussions... Sparxie burns ever brighter in everyone's eyes. "I've received everyone's feelings~ I'll return them with the most passionate response~♥! For example..." As the stream draws to a close, the young girl winks, as if she sees through the hearts of everyone behind their screens... "Here's your chance! Would you choose to become the cutesy Sparxie?"
equip.name: Dazzled by a Flowery World

ornaments.desc: The Planar Sphere encapsulates countless streaming windows in its digital space. It's a virtual society deeply interwoven with reality, a fantastical yet detached imaginary metropolis, an alternate life that anyone can peek into and participate within.
ornaments.name: Livestream's Protean Vistas

ornaments.desc: The Tengoku@Livestream might not be heaven. The countless messages flooding the chat windows can build glory or bring destruction, as it was never an isolation from reality, but rather an extension of it.
ornaments.name: Livestream's Chatter Banter

ranks.desc: When Aha Instant ends, gains 5 Punchline. For every 1 Punchline owned, increases All-Type RES PEN for all allies by 1.5%, up to a max increase of 15%.
ranks.name: #GoingViral #WhoIsShe

ranks.desc: When Aha Instant ends, Sparxie gains 1 extra turn and 2 "Thrill." For every 1 "Thrill" consumed, increases this unit's CRIT DMG by 10%, lasting for 2 turn(s) and stacking up to 4 time(s).
ranks.name: #AudienceKnows

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: #LinkUp #HeartSkip

ranks.desc: When using Ultimate, additionally gains 5 Punchline and increases this unit's Elation by 36% for 3 turn(s).
ranks.name: #LockedIn #FaceCard

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: #HealingTheWorld #GoodVibesOnly

ranks.desc: Increases All-Type RES PEN by 20%. For every 1 Punchline taken into account, the number of additional DMG instances dealt by the Elation Skill increases by 1, up to a max of 40.
ranks.name: #BuiltDifferent #GoingExtinct

relics.desc: The magical girl's candy-colored bow hairpin, shining like a glittering medal.
relics.name: Magical Girl's Shining Medal

relics.desc: Multi-functional magical girl gloves, combining entertainment and combat capabilities. Pure white hands, protecting everyone's wishes.
relics.name: Magical Girl's Protective Gloves

relics.desc: A customized multipurpose combat suit that doubles as an idol's performance miniskirt. Comfortable, lightweight, and stain-resistant.
relics.name: Magical Girl's Everdance Battle Skirt

relics.desc: First-class wear-resistant boots. True promises are built not on words, but on the steps you take to fulfill them.
relics.name: Magical Girl's Contract Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of Sparxie's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Cat Got Your Flametongue?

skill_stages.desc: Finalizes the livestream. Deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of Sparxie's ATK to one designated enemy, and Fire DMG equal to 50.0% of Sparxie's ATK to adjacent targets.
skill_stages.name: Bloom! Winner Takes All

skill_stages.desc: Start a livestream to turn Basic ATK into "Bloom! Winner Takes All" and trigger "Engagement Farming" 1 time. During this ability, "Engagement Farming" can be triggered repeatedly, up to 20 time(s). Using this ability is not considered as using a Skill.
skill_stages.name: Boom! Sparxicle's Poppin'

skill_stages.desc:
Causes "Bloom! Winner Takes All" to increase the DMG multiplier against one designated enemy by 20.0% and the DMG multiplier against adjacent targets by 10.0%. Randomly gains one of the following gifts:
"Straight Fire": 2 Punchline point(s) and 2 Skill point(s).
"Unreal Banger": 1 Punchline point(s).
Using this ability is not considered as using a Skill.
skill_stages.name: Engagement Farming

skill_stages.desc: Gains 2 Punchline point(s). Deals Fire DMG equal to (0.6 × Elation + 50.0%) of Sparxie's ATK to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Party's Wildin' and Camera's Rollin'

skill_stages.desc:
While Sparxie holds "Certified Banger":
Using Enhanced Basic ATK deals 40% Fire Elation DMG to one designated enemy, and 20.0% Fire Elation DMG to their adjacent targets. Additionally, for every 1 instance of "Engagement Farming" triggered, the Enhanced Basic ATK deals 1 extra instance of 20.0% Fire Elation DMG to 1 random attacked enemy target.
Using Ultimate deals 48% Fire Elation DMG to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Sleight of Sparx Hand

skill_stages.desc:
After using the Technique, inflicts enemies within a set area with "Block" for 10 second(s). "Blocked" enemies cannot detect ally targets.
After entering combat via actively attacking a "Blocked" enemy, deals Fire DMG to all enemies equal to 50% of Sparxie's ATK and recovers 2 Skill Point(s) for allies.
skill_stages.name: Content Monetization

skill_stages.desc: For every 100 of Sparxie's ATK that exceeds 2000, increases this unit's Elation by 5.0%, up to a maximum increase of 80.0%.
skill_stages.name: Sweet! Punchline Signing

skill_stages.desc: When there are 1/2/(3 or more) Elation characters in the team, using Sparxie's Ultimate will additionally gain 2/4/8 Punchline and 1/1/4 "Thrill".
skill_stages.name: Dazzling! Persona Kaleidoscope

skill_stages.desc: For every 1 Punchline currently owned, increases all allies' CRIT DMG by 8%, up to a max increase of 80%.
skill_stages.name: Frenzy! Palette of Truth and Lies

skill_stages.desc: Deals 50.0% Fire Elation DMG to all enemies and deals 20 additional instance(s) of DMG. Each instance deals 25.0% Fire Elation DMG to one random enemy. Grants 2 "Thrill" point(s) to Sparxie, which can be used to offset Sparxie's Skill Point consumption. Consuming "Thrill" is considered as consuming Skill Points.
skill_stages.name: Signal Overflow: The Great Encore!

equip.desc: In the crevices of time, only her heartbeat echoes. Like many nights before, watching in the darkness and resting in dormancy. She treasures the memories entrusted to her. The girl sets forth from a blank starting point, painting each stop she lingered at with vibrant colors. A cozy Express, companions each with their unique personalities, dazzling and magnificent planets... like a dream too beautiful to leave behind. "My real journey starts now!" The girl's declaration seems to whisper right beside her ear. She gazes toward the distant starry sky, as a beam of light approaches. It's the Express's headlight, like a shooting star. "Good night, March... When you awaken, continue on your Trailblaze journey ♭" As the memoria tide surges, she buries her wish deep in her heart, those tiny whispers and that light —she has never forgotten.
equip.name: To Evernight's Stars

skill_stages.desc: This ability automatically selects a target, prioritizing the enemy target that Evernight last attacked. Deals Ice DMG equal to 55% of Evey's Max HP to one enemy. For every 4 point(s) of "Memoria" Evernight currently has, additionally deals Ice DMG equal to 11.0% of Evey's Max HP. Gains 1 point(s) of "Memoria" after use.
skill_stages.name: Remembrance, Whirling, Like Rain

skill_stages.desc: This ability is used when Evernight's "Memoria" is greater than or equal to 16 and she is not affected by Crowd Control. For every 1 "Memoria" point currently held, deals Ice DMG equal to 13.2% of Evey's Max HP to the primary target, and Ice DMG equal to 6.6% of Evey's Max HP to the other enemy targets. After use, consumes all "Memoria" and HP, and makes Evey disappear.
skill_stages.name: Dream, Dissolving, as Dew

skill_stages.desc: Evey is immune to Crowd Control debuffs and has an increased chance of getting attacked. While Evey is on the field, Evernight and Evey deal 55% increased DMG.
skill_stages.name: Solitude, Drifting, In Murk

skill_stages.desc: When summoned, this unit immediately takes action.
skill_stages.name: Night, Trailing, In Step

skill_stages.desc: Upon disappearing, increases Evernight's SPD by 10%. If the disappearance is due to using "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," then, for every 1 "Memoria" point consumed by the attack, additionally increases Evernight's SPD by 1%. Up to 40 "Memoria" points can be taken into account for this. The SPD Boost effect cannot stack and is removed at the start of Evernight's next turn.
skill_stages.name: You, Parting, Beyond Reach

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Aidonia of Amphoreus. Believers of Thanatos have raised colossal monuments on the snow plains, offering tribute to the Holy Maiden who brings them the blessing of death.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deceased Gravestones

ornaments.desc: Animal bones, arrowheads, and caltrops bind the world of the Aidonians with that of the dead. The ascetics of the wastelands only hoped that their souls, unyielding, could pass through the frozen depths, and would not become lost from poverty or weakness on the way to seeing their god.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deathward Bone Chains

ranks.desc: When Evernight is on the field, if there are (4 or more)/3/2/1 enemy targets on the field, ally memosprites deal DMG equal to 120%/125%/130%/150% of their original DMG respectively.
ranks.name: Sleep Tight, the Night Dreams Long

ranks.desc: Increases Evernight's and the memosprite Evey's CRIT DMG by 40%. Each time Evernight gains "Memoria," increases the amount of "Memoria" gain by 2 point(s). When using Ultimate, additionally gains 2 Charge for "Darkest Riddle."
ranks.name: Listen Up, the Slumber Speaks Soft

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Memosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Fear Not, the Nightmare Lies Past

ranks.desc: While Evernight is on the field, ally memosprites' Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 25%, and the memosprite Evey's Weakness Break Efficiency additionally increases by 25%.
ranks.name: Wake Up, the Tomorrow is Yours

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Memosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Let Go, the "Me" in Memories

ranks.desc: While Evernight is on the field, all ally targets' All-Type RES PEN increases by 20%. After the memosprite Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," Evernight gains 30% of the amount of "Memoria" consumed in this attack.
ranks.name: Like This, Always

relics.desc: The hood that the legendary Deliverer wore to shield {F#herself}{M#himself} from storms. In actuality, it is probably nothing like what the bards describe.
relics.name: Deliverer's Hood

relics.desc: The gauntlets worn by the legendary Deliverer as {F#she}{M#he} blazed through adversities. In actuality, it is probably nothing like what the bards describe.
relics.name: Deliverer's Sword Gauntlet

relics.desc: The battle robe worn by the legendary Deliverer when {F#she}{M#he} engaged in combat. In actuality, it is probably nothing like what the bards describe.
relics.name: Deliverer's Robe of Legacy

relics.desc: The boots worn by the legendary Deliverer as {F#she}{M#he} trampled over mountains and braved through tides. In actuality, it is probably nothing like what the bards describe.
relics.name: Deliverer's Boots of Pioneering

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 55% of Evernight's Max HP to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Time Thence Blurs

skill_stages.desc: Consumes 10% of Evernight's current HP to summon memosprite Evey and increases CRIT DMG of all ally memosprites by an amount equal to 26% of Evernight's CRIT DMG for 2 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Evernight's every turn. If Evey is already on the field, restores its HP by 50% of its Max HP. When using this, gains 2 point(s) of "Memoria." If in the "Darkest Riddle" state, gains 12 additional point(s) of "Memoria."
skill_stages.name: Day Gently Slips

skill_stages.desc: Summons memosprite Evey. Then Evey deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to 220% of Evey's Max HP and Evernight enters the "Darkest Riddle" state. During this state, all enemies take 33% increased DMG while both Evernight and Evey deal 66% increased DMG and are immune to Crowd Control debuffs. Gains 2 point(s) of Charge for "Darkest Riddle." And Evey consumes 1 point after it uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew." At the start of Evernight's turn, if no Charge remains, exits the "Darkest Riddle" state.
skill_stages.name: O Wakeful World, Goodnight

skill_stages.desc:
When entering combat, summons memosprite Evey. Evey has an initial SPD of 160 and its Max HP equals to 50% of that of Evernight's. Each time Evernight or Evey loses HP, increases CRIT DMG for Evernight and Evey by 66% for 2 turn(s), and gains 2 "Memoria." This effect can trigger only once per target for each received attack.
When Evernight has 16 or more points of "Memoria," dispels Crowd Control debuffs and becomes immune to them. If Evey is on the field, it immediately takes action. The immediate action effect can only trigger again after Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew."
skill_stages.name: With Me, This Night

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, obtains the same effect as the one from Skill that increases CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites, and gains 1 "Memoria."
skill_stages.name: Let it Rain Cold On Thee

skill_stages.desc: Increases Evernight's and the memosprite Evey's CRIT Rate by 35%. When using an ability, consumes 5% of this unit's current HP to increase CRIT DMG for both of them by 15%, lasting for 2 turn(s). After Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," recovers 1 Skill Point for allies.
skill_stages.name: Dark the Night, Still the Moon

skill_stages.desc: When combat starts, Evernight regenerates 70 Energy and gains 1 "Memoria." When Evernight or an ally memosprite uses an ability, Evernight regenerates 5 Energy and gains 1 "Memoria."
skill_stages.name: Rouse the Flame, Lull the Light

skill_stages.desc: When there are 1/2/3/(4 or more) Remembrance characters in the team, increases CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites by 5%/15%/50%/65% respectively while Evernight's Skill lasts.
skill_stages.name: Kindle the Morn, Drop the Rain

equip.desc: Waves surge forth, their roar echoing across the heavens. Fish swim through the empty seas, where ancient foam churns and that melody seems to still linger. "Noble Princess, feast with us!" Answering the deep sea's call, she danced with the black tide until she alone remained on that grand stage. "Swordmaster of the seas, why do you stay silent, what makes you sing?" With every step upon the Earth, she endured the pain, rarely singing, only her crimson blade sang the lament of life. "Dux Gladiorum, come with me to conquer the starry seas!" When she found this blazing light, she finally took up her bow, believing it to be the start of the celebration. ... "Helektra... Helektra... when your song ends, where will you swim to next?" When futile hopes shatter, she always answers their questions with a solitary melody, yet it enchants all who hear it. Or perhaps... whether in the mortal realm or the deep sea, the only true listener is the performer herself.
equip.name: Why Does the Ocean Sing

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Styxia, the city drowned in eternal revelry. A lighthouse remains endlessly lit upon the shore, playing ceaseless melodies. Ships, lured by merry tunes, sail through the mists only to run aground and sink, their shattered wreckage devoured by the tide.
ornaments.name: Warbling Shores' Blazing Beacon

ornaments.desc: The people of Styxia firmly believe that the sea sirens, just as the legends say, guard their paradise with flesh and blood. And that one day, drawn by the lighthouse's endless cantillation, they will arrive at last, rewarded with an eternal feast.
ornaments.name: Warbling Shores' Cantillation Trail

ranks.desc: While Hysilens is on the field, the DoT dealt by ally targets is equal to 116% of their original value. When Hysilens inflicts Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock on enemies via her Talent, there is a 100% base chance to additionally inflict the target with 1 instance of Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock state that is equivalent to those from the original Talent effect and can coexist with such pre-existing states.
ranks.name: You Ask Why Hearts Cry

ranks.desc: While the Zone is active, the DMG Boost effect from Trace "The Fiddle of Pearls" applies to all allies.
ranks.name: Tell Me Why Waves Roar High

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Why Do Lights Bid Goodbye

ranks.desc: While the Zone is active, reduces All-Type RES of all enemies by 20%.
ranks.name: Lo, How Time Flows By

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: In Ablution, I Hum and Sigh

ranks.desc: While the Zone is active, at the start of each turn or after one attack by an ally target, increases the maximum trigger count for Hysilens's Physical DoT effect to 12, and increases the multiplier of the DMG dealt by 20%.
ranks.name: When to Return From Where You Lie

relics.desc: A muzzle designed to tightly encage the captive's beastly visage, guarding against the feral fangs that yearn to inflict harm.
relics.name: Prisoner's Sealed Muzzle

relics.desc: Heavy shackles that tightly bind the evildoer's hands with steel needles pinning into the wrists, preventing the vicious claws from doing harm again.
relics.name: Prisoner's Leadstone Shackles

relics.desc: A prisoner's garment that restrains dangerous criminals. Its reversed-joint design confines the prisoner's body.
relics.name: Prisoner's Repressive Straitjacket

relics.desc: Metal shackles that bind the feet of the beasts, imprisoning evils and preventing them from escaping and wrecking havoc.
relics.name: Prisoner's Restrictive Fetters

skill_stages.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to 110% of Hysilens's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Aeolian Mode: Echoes in Still Waters

skill_stages.desc: Has a 100% base chance to increase the DMG taken by all enemies by 22%, lasting for 3 turn(s). At the same time, deals Physical DMG equal to 154% of Hysilens's ATK to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Overtone Hum: Chorus After Dark Tides

skill_stages.desc:
Hysilens deploys a Zone that reduces enemy targets' ATK by 15.0% and DEF by 27.0%, and deals Physical DMG equal to 216% of Hysilens's ATK to all enemies.
For every 1 instance of DoT taken by an enemy target within the Zone, Hysilens deals Physical DoT equal to 88.0% of her ATK to them. This damage triggers at the start of each turn or after one attack by an ally target, up to 8 time(s). And it cannot repeatedly trigger this effect.
The Zone lasts for 3 turn(s) and this duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. When Hysilens gets knocked down, the Zone will also be dispelled.
skill_stages.name: Maelstrom Rhapsody

skill_stages.desc:
When an ally target attacks, there is a 100% base chance for Hysilens to inflict the hit enemy target with one of the following states: Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock. Priority is given to inflicting a different state.
While in the Wind Shear/Burn/Shock state, at the start of each turn, the enemy target takes Wind/Fire/Lightning DoT equal to 27.5% of Hysilens's ATK for 2 turn(s).
While in the Bleed state, at the start of each turn, the enemy target takes Physical DoT equal to 20.0% of their Max HP, up to 27.5% of Hysilens's ATK, lasting for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Sirenic Serenade

skill_stages.desc:
After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for 20 seconds and automatically moves forward. Enemies within the Special Dimension enter the "Soulstruck" state. "Soulstruck" enemies will not attack ally targets and will follow the dimension while it persists.
After entering combat with "Soulstruck" enemies, there is a 100% base chance to inflict each enemy target with 2 of the following states: Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock, all of which are equivalent to those provided by Hysilens's Talent effect. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skill_stages.name: At Ocean's Abode

skill_stages.desc: At the start of combat, Hysilens deploys a Zone, equivalent to that provided by her Ultimate, lasting for 3 turn(s). Whenever Hysilens deploys a Zone, she recovers 1 Skill Point(s).
skill_stages.name: The Gladius of Conquest

skill_stages.desc: When Hysilens uses Ultimate, if the enemy target is currently afflicted with DoT(s), all DoTs currently applied on the target will immediately produce DMG equal to 150% of their original DMG.
skill_stages.name: The Bubble of Banquets

skill_stages.desc: For every 10% of Hysilens's Effect Hit Rate that exceeds 60%, increases her DMG dealt by 15%, up to a max increase of 90%.
skill_stages.name: The Fiddle of Pearls

equip.desc: "Emotions are like clouds, and we are the sky that carries them. If the sky is overcast, then our emotions will fluctuate all over." The physician listens with care to the visitor's sorrows, offering words of gentle solace. "Please close your eyes and breathe slowly... Imagine yourself in a warm and soft place..." As if infused with magic, a seven-colored rainbow radiance spills from beneath the wings of the winged beast. "A breeze would drift across the plains, carrying the fragrance of wildflowers. Moist clouds would pass by, laden with sunlight..." The visitor gradually sinks into a peaceful dream, responding only with the quiet rhythm of steady breaths. After seeing the last patient, the physician gently closes the door of the ward. In the distance, the boundless evernight still surges, with many ruins standing like the scars of the earth. "In the next life, may dawn shine upon all..." Before departing, she makes a wish to the sky — "May the sky forever hold that rainbow radiance."
equip.name: Long May Rainbows Adorn the Sky

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG to all enemies by an amount equal to 22% of the tally of healing done by Hyacine and Little Ica in the current battle, and clears 50% of this tally of healing.
skill_stages.name: Rainclouds, Time to Go!

skill_stages.desc:
Little Ica maintains 0 SPD, is immune to debuffs, and will not appear in the Action Order.
If the HP of an ally target (except Little Ica) is reduced, then at the start of any target's turn or after any target takes action, Little Ica will consume 4% of their own Max HP and heal the ally target with reduced HP for an amount equal to 2.2% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 22.
While Hyacine is in the "After Rain" state, Little Ica gains 1 extra turn and automatically casts "Rainclouds, Time to Go!" immediately after Hyacine uses an ability. Moreover, when Little Ica triggers the Talent's healing effect, additionally restores HP for all ally targets by an amount equal to 2.2% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 22. After Little Ica uses an ability, the duration of all their Continuous Effects decreases by 1 turn.
skill_stages.name: Take Sky in Hand

skill_stages.desc: When summoned, regenerates 15 Energy for Hyacine. On the first summon, additionally regenerates 30 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Soar, Unto the Sunlight

skill_stages.desc: Upon disappearing, advances the action of Hyacine by 30%.
skill_stages.name: Fall, Then Take Wing

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Amphoreus' Grove of Epiphany, where the divine corpus of the Bough of Rift, Cerces, ponders. "The First Scholar" led others to establish gardens and courtyards within the woods and shared knowledge, and the Grove was born.
ornaments.name: Grove of Epiphany's Pondering Colossus

ornaments.desc: The golden threads and vines weave a network in the Grove, becoming a lifeline through which schools share their findings. Information enters from the roots, unraveled and deconstructed through the leaves' veins, until it becomes a drop of dew merging into the Library of Philia's pool.
ornaments.name: Grove of Epiphany's Interwoven Veins

ranks.desc: While Hyacine is in the "After Rain" state, all ally targets additionally increase their Max HP by 50%, and after using an attack, immediately restore their HP by an amount equal to 8% of Hyacine's Max HP.
ranks.name: Cradle the Candle of Night

ranks.desc: When an ally target's HP decreases, SPD increases by 30%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Come Sit in My Courtyard

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Memosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Depart, Unto the Sun!

ranks.desc: The "Tempestuous Halt" Trace gets enhanced: For every 1 excess SPD, additionally increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's CRIT DMG by 2%.
ranks.name: Sunlit Amber, Yours to Keep

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Memosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Twilight Drapes the Tide

ranks.desc: When Little Ica uses Memosprite Skill, the amount cleared from the tally of healing is changed to 12%. While Little Ica is on the field, all ally targets' All-Type RES PEN increases by 20%.
ranks.name: O Sky, Heed My Plea

relics.desc: This winged helm once bore witness to the Daythunder Knight toppling the sky god, and it also witnessed the sky closing its eyes.
relics.name: Warrior Goddess's Winged Helm

relics.desc: These gauntlets have accompanied the knight to victory in every battle. They grant the strength to grip the deadliest weapons, and endure the most agonizing betrayals.
relics.name: Warrior Goddess's Cavalry Gauntlets

relics.desc: This cloak shielded the Daythunder Knight from rain and dust, accompanying her through every adventure, leaving behind the most striking silhouette in the sky.
relics.name: Warrior Goddess's Dawn Cape

relics.desc: These spurs were a gift from the Daythunder Knight's two winged beast companions. This was the necessary pain to walk a path in pursuit of truth.
relics.name: Warrior Goddess's Honor Spurs

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 55% of Hyacine's Max HP to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: When Breeze Kisses Cirrus

skill_stages.desc: Summons memosprite Little Ica. Restores HP equal to 8.8% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 178 for all allies (except Little Ica), and restores HP equal to 11.0% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 222 for Little Ica.
skill_stages.name: Love Over the Rainbow

skill_stages.desc: Summons memosprite Little Ica. Restores HP equal to 11.0% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 222 for all allies (except Little Ica), and restores HP equal to 13.2% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 267 for Little Ica. Hyacine enters the "After Rain" state, lasting for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Hyacine's every turn. While "After Rain" is active, all ally targets increase their Max HP by 33.0% plus 667.
skill_stages.name: We Who Fly Into Twilight

skill_stages.desc: The memosprite Little Ica initially has Max HP equal to 50% of Hyacine's Max HP. When Hyacine or Little Ica provides healing, increases Little Ica's DMG dealt by 88% for 2 turn(s). Stacks up to 3 time(s).
skill_stages.name: First Light Heals the World

skill_stages.desc: When the next battle starts, restores HP by an amount equal to 30% of Hyacine's Max HP plus 600 for all allies and increases Max HP by 20%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Day So Right, Life So Fine!

skill_stages.desc: Increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's CRIT Rate by 100%. When providing healing to an ally target whose current HP is equal to or less than 50% of their Max HP, increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's Outgoing Healing by 25%.
skill_stages.name: Gloomy Grin

skill_stages.desc: Increases Hyacine's Effect RES by 50%. When using Skill and Ultimate, dispels 1 debuff(s) from all ally targets.
skill_stages.name: Stormy Caress

skill_stages.desc: When Hyacine's SPD exceeds 200, increases her and Little Ica's Max HP by 20%. Then, for every 1 excess SPD, increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's Outgoing Healing by 1%. Up to a max of 200 excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.
skill_stages.name: Tempestuous Halt

equip.desc: Another farewell ceremony was underway. A young girl, stepping on broken moonlight, wove a garland of parting by the riverbank. Ancient laments crystallized in the cold air, while the quiet river flowed into a distant land of blossoms. Blood-stained scrolls, rusted long swords, handkerchiefs embroidered with poetry... She accepted their remains, along with the tales of their lives. "My eyes are like lenses, forever longing for the starry sky." —An epitaph dedicated to the departed scholar. "For life and for death, the knight grants only a cold glance." —The maxim that the nameless warrior upheld all his life. "Life is nothing but death, aglow with shimmering light." —The final verse penned by the eternal-seeking poet with his life. ... "Every flower once bloomed with pride..." Accompanied by the river's soft lament, she offered the departed poems, garlands, and remembrances— "If withering is inevitable, at least let our farewell be... a little more beautiful."
equip.name: Make Farewells More Beautiful

skill_stages.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 44.0% of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.
skill_stages.name: Claw Splits the Veil

skill_stages.desc:
Launching "Breath Scorches the Shadow" will consume 25% of Netherwing's Max HP to deal Quantum DMG equal to 26.4% of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.
In one attack, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" can be launched repeatedly, with the DMG multiplier increased progressively to 30.8% / 37.4%. After reaching 37.4%, it will not increase further. The DMG Multiplier Boost effect will not decrease before Netherwing disappears.
When Netherwing's current HP is equal to or less than 25% of its Max HP, launching this ability will actively reduce HP down to 1, and then trigger the ability effect equal to that of the Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."
skill_stages.name: Breath Scorches the Shadow

skill_stages.desc: When Netherwing is on the field, it acts as backup for allies. When allies take DMG or consume HP, their current HP can be reduced down to a minimum of 1, after which Netherwing will bear the HP loss. But Netherwing consumes HP equal to 500% of the original value. This lasts until Netherwing disappears.
skill_stages.name: Mooncocoon Shrouds the Form

skill_stages.desc: When Netherwing disappears, deals 6 instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Quantum DMG equal to 44.0% of Castorice's Max HP to one random enemy. At the same time, restores HP by an amount equal to 6% of Castorice's Max HP plus 880 for all allies.
skill_stages.name: Wings Sweep the Ruins

skill_stages.desc: When Netherwing is summoned, increases DMG dealt by all allies by 10%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Roar Rumbles the Realm

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Aidonia of Amphoreus. Believers of Thanatos have raised colossal monuments on the snow plains, offering tribute to the Holy Maiden who brings them the blessing of death.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deceased Gravestones

ornaments.desc: Animal bones, arrowheads, and caltrops bind the world of the Aidonians with that of the dead. The ascetics of the wastelands only hoped that their souls, unyielding, could pass through the frozen depths, and would not become lost from poverty or weakness on the way to seeing their god.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deathward Bone Chains

ranks.desc: When the enemy target's current HP is 80%/50% of Max HP or lower, the DMG dealt to it by "Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace," "Claw Splits the Veil," "Breath Scorches the Shadow," and "Wings Sweep the Ruins" is 120%/140% of the original DMG respectively.
ranks.name: Snowbound Maiden, Memory to Tomb

ranks.desc: After summoning the memosprite Netherwing, Castorice gains 2 stack(s) of "Ardent Will." "Ardent Will" can stack up to 2 time(s) and can be used to offset the HP cost of Netherwing's Memosprite Skill, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and advance Castorice's action by 100%. When using the next Enhanced Skill, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to 30% of max "Newbud."
ranks.name: Crown on Wings of Bloom

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Memosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Pious Pilgrim, Dance in Doom

ranks.desc: While Castorice is on the field, all allies' HP restored when receiving healing increases by 20%.
ranks.name: Rest in Songs of Gloom

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Memosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Pristine Pages, Prophecy as Plume

ranks.desc: When Castorice or Netherwing deals DMG, increases Quantum RES PEN by 20%. During Netherwing's attacks, can reduce enemy Toughness regardless of Weakness Types. When breaking Weaknesses, triggers the Quantum Weakness Break effect. And the number of Bounces for Netherwing's Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins" additionally increases by 3.
ranks.name: Await for Years to Loom

relics.desc: Before the Temple of Dusk in spring, the most outstanding of bards will receive a dill wreath bequeathed by Mnestia.
relics.name: Poet's Dill Wreath

relics.desc: A bracelet crafted from favored metal. The evil dragon in the story was once fettered in shackles made from this metal.
relics.name: Poet's Gilded Bracelet

relics.desc: Dawn is the gentlest time of the day, her skirt is coincidentally also the colors of the last string of stars before dawn.
relics.name: Poet's Star-Studded Skirt

relics.desc: Woven shoes inlaid with silver studs, pressing worded patterns across the sand she treads. On her mission to gather all the poems of the past, she has never once ceased her footsteps.
relics.name: Poet's Silver-Studded Shoes

skill_stages.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 55% of Castorice's Max HP to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Lament, Nethersea's Ripple

skill_stages.desc:
Consumes 30% of all allies' current HP. Deals Quantum DMG equal to 55% of Castorice's Max HP to one designated enemy and Quantum DMG equal to 33% of Castorice's Max HP to adjacent targets.
If the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.
If Netherwing is on the battlefield, the Skill becomes "Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace" instead.
skill_stages.name: Silence, Wraithfly's Caress

skill_stages.desc:
Consumes 40% of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing). Castorice and Netherwing launch Joint ATK on the targets, dealing Quantum DMG equal to 33.0% and 55.0% of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.
If the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.
skill_stages.name: Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace

skill_stages.desc:
Summons the memosprite Netherwing and advances its action by 100%. At the same time, deploys the Territory "Lost Netherland," which decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by 22%. If Castorice has the DMG Boost effect from her Talent, then this effect spreads to Netherwing. Netherwing has an initial SPD of 165 and a set Max HP equal to 100% of max "Newbud."
After Netherwing experiences 3 turns or when its HP is 0, it disappears and dispels the Territory "Lost Netherland."
skill_stages.name: Doomshriek, Dawn's Chime

skill_stages.desc:
The maximum limit of "Newbud" is related to the levels of all characters on the battlefield. For every 1 point of HP lost by all allies, Castorice gains 1 point of "Newbud." When "Newbud" reaches its maximum limit, can activate the Ultimate. When allies lose HP, Castorice's and Netherwing's DMG dealt increases by 22%. This effect can stack up to 3 time(s), lasting for 3 turn(s).
When Netherwing is on the field, "Newbud" cannot be gained through Talent, and every 1 point of HP lost by all allies (except Netherwing) will be converted to an equal amount of HP for Netherwing.
skill_stages.name: Desolation Across Palms

skill_stages.desc:
After using Technique, enters the "Netherveil" state that lasts for 20 seconds. While "Netherveil" is active, enemies are unable to actively approach Castorice.
During "Netherveil," active attacks will cause all enemies within range to enter combat. At the same time, summons the memosprite Netherwing, advances its action by 100%, and deploys the Territory "Lost Netherland." Netherwing has its current HP equal to 50% of max "Newbud." After entering battle, consumes 40% of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing).
If Netherwing is not summoned after entering battle, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to 30% of max "Newbud."
skill_stages.name: Wail, Death's Herald

skill_stages.desc: After ally targets (excluding Netherwing) receive healing, converts 100% of the healed amount into "Newbud." If Netherwing is on the field, this is converted to Netherwing's HP instead. Each ally target can accumulate a conversion amount up to 12% of the max "Newbud." After any unit takes action, all units reset their accumulated conversion amount.
skill_stages.name: Contained Dark Tide

skill_stages.desc: When Castorice's current HP is higher than or equal to 50% of her Max HP, her SPD increases by 40%. When Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field or brings them to a point where their HP cannot be reduced further, Netherwing's SPD increases by 100%, lasting for 1 turn.
skill_stages.name: Inverted Torch

skill_stages.desc: Each time Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow," the DMG dealt increases by 30%. This effect stacks up to 6 time(s) and lasts until the end of this turn.
skill_stages.name: Where The West Wind Dwells

equip.desc: The cat-eared girl stretches her limbs on the rooftop, slinking into the night. In the treasure vault that had slumbered for a thousand years, she glides effortlessly, gathering precious treasures into her embrace before vanishing without a sound. "Foolish fate could never catch me!" The wind through the ruins carries the scent of the wild, rustling her hood. Resting her head against the cold stone, she swallows a bite of rough, dry rations, idly tossing a gold coin between her fingers. A faint sound from afar reaches her ears. In that holy city bathed in dawn's light, the bustling crowds still revel in warmth and celebration. "How much longer... a year, or ten thousand?" She stretches with a lazy yawn, casting her restless thoughts aside. "Hah, Cifera always has the last laugh!" A golden streak of lightning cuts across the sky, and her proclamation lingers in the wind— Just as it had a thousand years ago.
equip.name: Lies Dance on the Breeze

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is a submerged city in the marine world Lushaka. The sea level rose to the point where even the city was drowned. Only gigantic "stateships" carrying their sailors chug along across the sea, in search of the direction for their next distant voyage.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Waterscape

ornaments.desc: On the boundless horizon, even the faintest mark can shatter this silence. The navigational lanes bear the history of the crew while the aqua sprites pursue hope along the water currents.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Twinlanes

ranks.desc: Cipher's tally of DMG is 150% of its original value. When using the Talent's Follow-Up ATK, increases Cipher's ATK by 80%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Read the Room, Seek the Glee

ranks.desc: When Cipher hits an enemy target, there is a 120% base chance to increase the DMG it receives by 30%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: In the Fray, Nab On a Spree

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: From Thin Air, Hard to Foresee

ranks.desc: After the "Patron" gets attacked by an ally target, Cipher deals Quantum Additional DMG to it equal to 50% of Cipher's ATK.
ranks.name: The Jig Is Up, Quick to Flee

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Safe in Numbers, Light as a Bee

ranks.desc: The DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK from Cipher's Talent increases by 350%. During the tally, an additional 16% of non-Overflow DMG dealt by this attack is tallied. After the tally is cleared by using Ultimate, 20% of the cleared tally is returned.
ranks.name: The Thief's Game, Unsung and Free

relics.desc: A heavy diving helmet in a style common in Orkron. Through the small porthole, one can only see the unbearable and endless expanse of darkness.
relics.name: Pioneer's Heatproof Shell

relics.desc: A compass in the form of a wristwatch. The magnetic needle has been removed and can no longer point in any direction.
relics.name: Pioneer's Lacuna Compass

relics.desc: A heavy diving suit crafted from scrap iron, airtight and impenetrable. Even its wearer often jests that it resembles more of a deep-sea coffin.
relics.name: Pioneer's Sealed Lead Apron

relics.desc: The heavy boots are formed like the anchor of a ship. Its owner is prepared to never return to the surface.
relics.name: Pioneer's Starfaring Anchor

skill_stages.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 110% of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Oops, a Missed Catch

skill_stages.desc: Has a 120% base chance to Weaken one designated enemy and its adjacent targets (decreasing their DMG dealt by 10%) and increases Cipher's ATK by 30%, lasting for 2 turn(s). Moreover, deals Quantum DMG equal to 220% of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to 110% of Cipher's ATK to the adjacent targets.
skill_stages.name: Hey, Jackpot for the Taking

skill_stages.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 132% of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy. Then, deals True DMG equal to 25% of the current tally kept by Talent to the one designated enemy. Moreover, deals Quantum DMG equal to 44% of Cipher's ATK alongside True DMG equal to 75% of the current tally kept by Talent to the one designated enemy and its adjacent targets. And this True DMG is distributed evenly among all targets of this ability.
skill_stages.name: Yours Truly, Kitty Phantom Thief!

skill_stages.desc:
When there are no enemy targets in the "Patron" state on the battlefield, Cipher immediately causes one enemy target with the highest Max HP on the battlefield to become the "Patron." When using Skill and Ultimate, the primary target becomes the "Patron." The "Patron" state only takes effect on the most recent target.
After the "Patron" gets attacked by other ally targets, Cipher immediately launches Follow-Up ATK against the "Patron," dealing Quantum DMG equal to 165% of Cipher's ATK. This effect can trigger up to 1 time(s) per turn, and this trigger count resets at the start of Cipher's turn.
Cipher will tally 12% of the non-True DMG dealt by ally targets to the "Patron." Overflow DMG will not be tallied. After using Ultimate, clears this tally.
skill_stages.name: The Hospitable Dolosian

skill_stages.desc:
Gains "Zagreus's Blessing" that lasts for 15 second(s). During this time, Cipher will be undetectable by enemies and her movement speed increases by 50%. When approaching an enemy in the overworld/Simulated Universe/Divergent Universe, can immediately gain a random Consumable. Consumables can be gained this way for up to 50 time(s) in each Earth day.
When entering battle with "Zagreus's Blessing" active, deals Quantum DMG equal to 100% of Cipher's ATK to all enemies. And the tallied amount Cipher gains from this instance of DMG increases by 200%.
skill_stages.name: Puss in Boots

skill_stages.desc: When Cipher's SPD is higher than or equal to 140/170, CRIT Rate increases by 25%/50%, and the gained tally increases by 50%/100%.
skill_stages.name: Empyrean Strides

skill_stages.desc: Cipher can tally 8% of the non-True DMG dealt by ally targets to the enemy targets other than the "Patron." Overflow DMG is not tallied.
skill_stages.name: 300 Rogues

skill_stages.desc: Increases the CRIT DMG dealt by the Talent's Follow-Up ATK by 100%. When Cipher is on the battlefield, DMG received by all enemy targets increases by 40%.
skill_stages.name: Sleight of Sky

equip.desc: "Come, come to me..." A vivid memory, guided by flames, envelops her body and soul. The bygone days had fallen into the grave, is that true? "Hush, don't weep, don't resist..." She brands herself onto others' hearts, as strange gazes gradually turn familiar. "Do you remember now?" As the embers of old memories scatter away, her face carries a trace of intoxicating floral fragrance... "I am your memory."
equip.name: Never Forget Her Flame

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Flamewheel Forge, the location of the Xianzhou Zhuming's Artisanship Commission. A sphere the size of a celestial body, constructed around the progenitor of all heliobi, the Flint Emperor. Ingenious artisans draw energy from it and mold wondrous thoughts and inspirations into form.
ornaments.name: Forge's Lotus Lantern Wick

ornaments.desc: The heliobus progenitor, as grand in scope and size as a star, drowns in an endless dream. As it slumbers, the atoms and molecules around its body clash and spark, endlessly permeating outward from the external shell crafted from the Flamewheel, ultimately appearing as iridescent light bands resembling strands of celestial silk.
ornaments.name: Forge's Heavenly Flamewheel Silk

ranks.desc: The Super Break DMG multiplier provided by Talent to "Dance Partners" now applies to all ally characters, with "Dance Partners" additionally receiving a 40% boost. After "Dance Partners" use an attack, additionally deals the attacked enemy targets a fixed amount of Toughness Reduction equal to 25% of their Max Toughness (minimum 10, maximum 300). This effect can only trigger once per enemy target, and this trigger count resets after the enemy target receives a killing blow.
ranks.name: When a Bud Readies to Bloom

ranks.desc: When The Dahlia is on the field, decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by 20%. When an enemy target enters the field, immediately inflicts "Wilt" on them, lasting for 3 turn(s).
ranks.name: Fresh, Ethereal, and Beloved

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Pity Its Petals Thin as Mist

ranks.desc: Increases the number of DMG instances dealt by Talent's Follow-Up ATK by 5. Upon its use, the DMG taken by all enemy targets increases by 12%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Pity Its Heart Gnawed by Worms

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Fallen, Decayed, and Despised

ranks.desc: Increases Dance Partners' Break Effect by 150%. When using Talent's Follow-Up ATK, advances the next action of all "Dance Partners" by 20%.
ranks.name: And Yet, Always, Deathly Beautiful

relics.desc: An iron helm that significantly enhances sensory signals, fusing the consciousness of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry together with their armor.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Homing Helm

relics.desc: A powerful iron wristguard that can crush insectoids. It is sharp and light while being hard and sturdy.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Crushing Wristguard

relics.desc: The fiery propulsion armor gives Glamoth's Iron Cavalry a flame hot enough to ignite the battlefield.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Silvery Armor

relics.desc: Mechanical greaves that combine destructive capacities with speed. They allow Glamoth's Iron Cavalry to leap high and concentrate their strength into a kick directed at a single point on the enemy.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Skywalk Greaves

skill_stages.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to 100% of The Dahlia's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Fiddle... Fissured Memory

skill_stages.desc:
Deploys a Zone that lasts for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of The Dahlia's turn. Then, deals Fire DMG equal to 160% of The Dahlia's ATK to one designated enemy and their adjacent targets.
While the Zone lasts, increases all allies' Weakness Break Efficiency by 50%. Toughness Reduction taken by enemy targets while not Weakness Broken can also be converted into Super Break DMG.
skill_stages.name: Lick... Enkindled Betrayal

skill_stages.desc:
Inflicts a "Wilt" state on all enemies, lasting for 4 turn(s). Then, deals Fire DMG equal to 300% of The Dahlia's ATK, which is distributed evenly across all enemies.
Enemy targets in the "Wilt" state have their DEF reduced by 18.0% and will be implanted with Weakness of all Dance Partners' Types.
skill_stages.name: Wallow... Entombed Ash

skill_stages.desc:
When entering combat, The Dahlia regenerates 35 Energy and becomes "Dance Partners" along with the teammate that triggered combat. Whenever there is no other "Dance Partner" on the field, this unit and the teammate with the highest Break Effect become "Dance Partners" together. After a "Dance Partner" attacks a Weakness Broken enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this attack will be converted into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at 60%.
After an enemy target gets attacked by the other "Dance Partner," The Dahlia launches Follow-Up ATK and deals 5 instance(s) of DMG, each dealing Fire DMG equal to 30% of The Dahlia's ATK to one random enemy. After each instance of DMG dealt to a Weakness Broken enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this DMG will be converted into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at 200%.
This effect can only trigger once per turn. If the target is defeated before the Follow-Up ATK is used, it will be launched at one random enemy instead.
skill_stages.name: Who's Afraid of Constance?

skill_stages.desc:
After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for 20 second(s). Enemies within this dimension will not actively attack ally targets. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, The Dahlia immediately deploys her Skill's Zone, and converts the combat-triggering Toughness Reduction into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at 60% against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skill_stages.name: The Heart Makes the Finest Tomb

skill_stages.desc: When entering combat, increases other characters' Break Effect by an amount equal to 24% of The Dahlia's Break Effect plus 50%, lasting for 1 turn(s). When The Dahlia receives healing or a Shield provided by a teammate, this effect triggers again, lasting for 3 turn(s). Cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.
skill_stages.name: Yet Another Funeral

skill_stages.desc: When using Talent's Follow-Up ATK, recovers 1 Skill Point for allies. For every 2 instance(s) of Talent's Follow-Up ATK used, this effect can trigger once.
skill_stages.name: Lament, Lost Soul

skill_stages.desc: When an ally target adds Weakness to an enemy target, increases SPD by 30% for 2 turn(s). If a Fire ally character has implanted a Weakness when using an attack, then after the attack, additionally deals a fixed amount of 20 Fire Toughness Reduction to every target implanted with Weakness. Also, regenerates Energy equal to 10% of Max Energy. This effect can regenerate Energy up to 50% of Max Energy.
skill_stages.name: Outgrow the Old, Espouse the New

equip.desc: Time flows through the mirror, metamorphosing the once inexperienced little girl into a seasoned songstress. She studies her reflection in the mirror. Time has altered all but her green eyes, which still remain as serene as a lake, as if recounting an unshakable faith. "You seem in high spirits today." "Yes... after all, there's a very important 'performance'." "Indeed. The Charmony Festival's rehearsal is about to start. Please head to the preparation room." ... She steps out from the dressing room, leaving behind the brilliant lights of the theater, fading into the distance. "My stage lies not here." She closes her eyes, letting the night swallow her silhouette. "From the past to the present, my song has always been for..." "For those who have lost hope."
equip.name: Flowing Nightglow

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is Wacq Island, the most well-known island on Planet Vonwacq. Teeming with plant life, the island houses a gigantic tree called Thestang, bearing fruits that would give birth to the various kinds of the island's wildlife.
ornaments.name: Vonwacq's Island of Birth

ornaments.desc: On the coastline of Wacq Island, tidal waves rose and fell... This landscape remained the same for millennia and witnessed the rise and fall of civilizations just like those changing tides.
ornaments.name: Vonwacq's Islandic Coast

ranks.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, all allies' All-Type RES PEN increases by 24%.
ranks.name: Land of Smiles

ranks.desc: While the Concerto state is active, all allies' SPD increases by 16%. The Talent's Energy Regeneration effect additionally increases by 1.
ranks.name: Afternoon Tea For Two

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Inverted Tuning

ranks.desc: When using the Ultimate, dispels Crowd Control debuffs from all allies. While Robin is in the "Concerto" state, increases the Effect RES of all allies by 50%.
ranks.name: Raindrop Key

ranks.desc:
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Lonestar's Lament

ranks.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, the CRIT DMG for the Physical Additional DMG caused by the Ultimate increases by 450%. The effect of "Moonless Midnight" can trigger up to 8 time(s) and the trigger count resets each time the Ultimate is used.
ranks.name: Moonless Midnight

relics.desc: A muzzle designed to tightly encage the captive's beastly visage, guarding against the feral fangs that yearn to inflict harm.
relics.name: Prisoner's Sealed Muzzle

relics.desc: A pair of leather gloves with partially cracked surfaces. The part where one holds a gun is particularly worn out.
relics.name: Musketeer's Coarse Leather Gloves

relics.desc: A prisoner's garment that restrains dangerous criminals. Its reversed-joint design confines the prisoner's body.
relics.name: Prisoner's Repressive Straitjacket

relics.desc: These riding boots have a V-shaped cutout. Appearing casual and loose, they are also very comfortable to wear.
relics.name: Musketeer's Rivets Riding Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to 110% of Robin's ATK to one designated enemy target.
skill_stages.name: Wingflip White Noise

skill_stages.desc: Increase DMG dealt by all allies by 55%, lasting for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Robin's every turn.
skill_stages.name: Pinion's Aria

skill_stages.desc:
Robin enters the "Concerto" state and makes all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit) immediately take action.
While in the "Concerto" state, increases all allies' ATK by 24.3% of Robin's ATK plus 230. Moreover, after every attack by ally targets, Robin deals Physical Additional DMG equal to 129% of her ATK for 1 time, with a fixed CRIT Rate for this damage set at 100% and fixed CRIT DMG set at 150%.
While in the "Concerto" state, Robin is immune to Crowd Control debuffs and cannot enter her turn or take action until the "Concerto" state ends.
A "Concerto" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, Robin exits the "Concerto" state and immediately takes action. The countdown has its own fixed SPD of 90.
skill_stages.name: Vox Harmonique, Opus Cosmique

skill_stages.desc: Increase all allies' CRIT DMG by 23.0%. Moreover, after allies attack enemy targets, Robin additionally regenerates 2 Energy for herself.
skill_stages.name: Tonal Resonance

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension around the character that lasts for 15 seconds. Enemies within this dimension will not attack Robin and will follow Robin while the dimension is active. After entering battle while the dimension is active, Robin regenerates 5 Energy at the start of each wave. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skill_stages.name: Overture of Inebriation

skill_stages.desc: When the battle begins, action advances this character by 25%.
skill_stages.name: Coloratura Cadenza

skill_stages.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, the CRIT DMG dealt when all allies launch Follow-Up ATK increases by 25%.
skill_stages.name: Impromptu Flourish

skill_stages.desc: When using Skill, additionally regenerates 5 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Sequential Passage

equip.desc:
Flowing in the narrow border between "existence" and "nothingness," the ice-cold tides eternally lap against the shores and bring all things to their final end.

In this place, the drowned ask for help, lament with songs, find their happiness, enjoy sweet moments, and suffer great agony... All these are reflected in the water. She cannot experience these, but she can feel them —
There are still many roads to walk, many sounds to listen to, and many things to change before she arrives at the end.

She reaches out and saves the drowning from the temptations of Nihility, and one mirage after another bursts apart behind her figure.
She keeps walking in this boundless world, all for an end that does not exist.

— And it's always raining here.
equip.name: Along the Passing Shore

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is Izumo, with its past and future severed with a slash. Izumo was once covered in indescribable wars of survival, as well as once being blessed with glorious days of bountiful luxury... Now, the barren land is nowhere to be found, leaving behind only a graveyard of swords where the past lies buried.
ornaments.name: Izumo's Magatsu no Morokami

ornaments.desc: The people of Izumo use tassels to bind the sharp blades to their belts. They walk the world to hunt down Kami with their blades, then used the divine carcasses to forge new blades... In this never-ending cycle, Izumo marches toward prosperity, towards disillusion, and towards the void.
ornaments.name: Izumo's Blades of Origin and End

ranks.desc: When dealing DMG to debuffed enemies, increases CRIT Rate by 18%.
ranks.name: Silenced Sky Spake Sooth

ranks.desc: The number of Nihility characters required for the Trace "The Abyss" to achieve its highest possible effect is reduced by 1. When this unit's turn starts, gains 1 point of Slashed Dream and inflicts 1 stack of Crimson Knot on the enemy with the most Crimson Knot stacks.
ranks.name: Mute Thunder in Still Tempest

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Frost Bites in Death

ranks.desc: When enemy targets enter combat, inflicts them with the Ultimate DMG Vulnerability, increasing the amount of Ultimate DMG they take by 8%.
ranks.name: Shrined Fire for Mirrored Soul

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Strewn Souls on Erased Earths

ranks.desc: Increases the All-Type RES PEN for the Ultimate DMG dealt by Acheron by 20%. The DMG dealt by Basic ATK and Skill will also be considered as Ultimate DMG and can Reduce enemy Toughness regardless of Weakness Types. When breaking Weaknesses, triggers the Lightning Weakness Break effect.
ranks.name: Apocalypse, the Emancipator

relics.desc: A heavy diving helmet in a style common in Orkron. Through the small porthole, one can only see the unbearable and endless expanse of darkness.
relics.name: Pioneer's Heatproof Shell

relics.desc: A compass in the form of a wristwatch. The magnetic needle has been removed and can no longer point in any direction.
relics.name: Pioneer's Lacuna Compass

relics.desc: A heavy diving suit crafted from scrap iron, airtight and impenetrable. Even its wearer often jests that it resembles more of a deep-sea coffin.
relics.name: Pioneer's Sealed Lead Apron

relics.desc: The heavy boots are formed like the anchor of a ship. Its owner is prepared to never return to the surface.
relics.name: Pioneer's Starfaring Anchor

skill_stages.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 110% of Acheron's ATK to one designated enemy target.
skill_stages.name: Trilateral Wiltcross

skill_stages.desc: Gains 1 point(s) of "Slashed Dream." Inflicts 1 stack(s) of "Crimson Knot" on one designated enemy target, dealing Lightning DMG equal to 176% of Acheron's ATK to this target, as well as Lightning DMG equal to 66% of Acheron's ATK to adjacent targets.
skill_stages.name: Octobolt Flash

skill_stages.desc:
Sequentially unleash "Rainblade" 3 times and "Stygian Resurge" 1 time, dealing Lightning DMG up to 401% of Acheron's ATK to one designated enemy target, as well as Lightning DMG up to 324% of Acheron's ATK to other targets.
"Rainblade": Deals Lightning DMG equal to 25.9% of Acheron's ATK to one designated enemy target and removes up to 3 stacks of "Crimson Knot" from the target. When "Crimson Knot" is removed, immediately deals Lightning DMG equal to 16.2% of Acheron's ATK to all enemies. For every stack of "Crimson Knot" removed, this DMG Multiplier is additionally increased, up to a maximum of 64.8%.
"Stygian Resurge": Deals Lightning DMG equal to 129% of Acheron's ATK to all enemies and remove all "Crimson Knots."
"Crimson Knot" cannot be applied to enemies during the Ultimate.
skill_stages.name: Slashed Dream Cries in Red

skill_stages.desc:
When Slashed Dream reaches 9 point(s), the Ultimate can be activated. During the Ultimate, reduces enemies' Toughness regardless of Weakness Types and reduces all enemies' All-Type RES by 22%, lasting until the end of the Ultimate.
When any unit inflicts debuffs on an enemy target while using their ability, Acheron gains 1 point of Slashed Dream and inflicts 1 stack of Crimson Knot on a target. If debuffs are inflicted on multiple targets, then the 1 stack of Crimson Knot will be inflicted on the enemy target with the most Crimson Knot stacks. This effect can only trigger once for every ability use.
After an enemy target exits the field or gets defeated by any unit while Acheron is on the field, their Crimson Knot stacks will be transferred to the enemy target with the most Crimson Knot stacks on the whole field.
skill_stages.name: Atop Rainleaf Hangs Oneness

skill_stages.desc:
Immediately attacks the enemy. At the start of each wave, gains Quadrivalent Ascendance, dealing Lightning DMG equal to 200% of Acheron's ATK to all enemies and reducing Toughness of all enemies irrespective of Weakness Types. When breaking Weaknesses, triggers the Lightning Weakness Break effect.
Quadrivalent Ascendance: After using the Ultimate, Acheron gains 1 point(s) of Slashed Dream and inflicts 1 stack(s) of Crimson Knot on a single random enemy.
If attacking a normal enemy, immediately defeats them without entering combat. When not hitting enemies, no Technique Points are consumed.
skill_stages.name: Quadrivalent Ascendance

skill_stages.desc: When battle starts, immediately gains 5 point(s) of Slashed Dream and applies 5 stack(s) of Crimson Knot to a random enemy. When Slashed Dream reaches its upper limit, for every point of Slashed Dream that exceeds the limit, gains 1 stack of Quadrivalent Ascendance. Enables Quadrivalent Ascendance to stack up to 3 time(s).
skill_stages.name: Red Oni

skill_stages.desc: When there are 1 or 2 Nihility characters other than Acheron in the team, the DMG dealt by Acheron's Basic ATK, Skill, and Ultimate increases to 115% or 160% of the original DMG respectively.
skill_stages.name: The Abyss

skill_stages.desc: When the Ultimate's Rainblade hits enemy targets that have Crimson Knot, the DMG dealt by Acheron increases by 30%, stacking up to 3 time(s) and lasting for 3 turn(s). And when Stygian Resurge triggers, additionally deals DMG for 6 times. Each time deals Lightning DMG equal to 25% of Acheron's ATK to a single random enemy and is considered as Ultimate DMG.
skill_stages.name: Thunder Core

equip.desc: Light the candles, spread the cards, breathe in the fragrance... These broken memories become faces in the dancing light. The apparitions that emerge from flames tell her of pasts fondly recalled. Time is shorn. The moment is frozen. She turns these most precious instants into crystallizations of eternity. "There is too much lost, and too little that remains... We nurture remembrance against the cruelties of time."
equip.name: Reforged Remembrance

ornaments.desc: The IPC's headquarters at Pier Point is sealed within a Planar Sphere. No planet can hide from the grand business plan of the Interastral Peace Corporation. They ventured into deep space to harvest the power of the entire universe.
ornaments.name: The IPC's Mega HQ

ornaments.desc: With the convenient help of the credit system, interstellar commerce was established. The Interastral Peace Corporation connected the stars with economic activity and expanded the borders of trade.
ornaments.name: The IPC's Trade Route

ranks.desc: While Black Swan is active in combat, enemies afflicted with Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock will have their corresponding Wind, Physical, Fire, or Lightning RES respectively reduced by 25%.
ranks.name: Seven Pillars of Wisdom

ranks.desc: When enemy targets enter combat, there is a 100% base chance to inflict 30 stack(s) of "Arcana" on them.
ranks.name: Weep Not For Me, My Lamb

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: As Above, So Below

ranks.desc: While in the "Epiphany" state, enemy targets take 20% increased DMG. And at the start of every turn or when they get defeated, regenerates 8 Energy for Black Swan.
ranks.name: In Tears We Gift

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Linnutee Flyway

ranks.desc:
The upper limit of stackable "Arcana" increases by 30.
When an enemy target gets attacked by Black Swan's teammates, Black Swan has a 65% base chance of inflicting 1 stack of "Arcana" on the target.
For every 1 stack of "Arcana" Black Swan inflicts on an enemy target, additionally increases the number of "Arcana" stacked this time by 1.
ranks.name: Pantheon Merciful, Masses Pitiful

relics.desc: A muzzle designed to tightly encage the captive's beastly visage, guarding against the feral fangs that yearn to inflict harm.
relics.name: Prisoner's Sealed Muzzle

relics.desc: Heavy shackles that tightly bind the evildoer's hands with steel needles pinning into the wrists, preventing the vicious claws from doing harm again.
relics.name: Prisoner's Leadstone Shackles

relics.desc: A prisoner's garment that restrains dangerous criminals. Its reversed-joint design confines the prisoner's body.
