relics.name: Prisoner's Repressive Straitjacket

relics.desc: Metal shackles that bind the feet of the beasts, imprisoning evils and preventing them from escaping and wrecking havoc.
relics.name: Prisoner's Restrictive Fetters

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 110% of Black Swan's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Percipience, Silent Dawn

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 99% of Black Swan's ATK to one designated enemy and adjacent targets. At the same time, there is a 100% base chance of reducing the DEF of the enemy target and the adjacent targets by 22.0%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Decadence, False Twilight

skill_stages.desc:
Inflicts "Epiphany" state on all enemies for 2 turn(s). Then deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to 129% of Black Swan's ATK.
While in the "Epiphany" state, enemy targets take 27% increased DMG. For every 1 stack of "Arcana inflicted," there is a 50% fixed chance to additionally increase the number of "Arcana" stacked this time by 1. And "Arcana" stacks won't be halved after dealing DMG at the start of the turn.
skill_stages.name: Bliss of Otherworld's Embrace

skill_stages.desc:
Every time an enemy target receives 1 instance of DoT, there is a 68% base chance for it to be inflicted with 1 stack of "Arcana".
While an enemy target is in the "Arcana" state, they are also considered to be simultaneously afflicted with Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, and Shock. The target receives Wind DoT equal to 264% of Black Swan's ATK at the start of each turn, after which the number of stacks is halved. Each stack of "Arcana" increases this DMG multiplier by 13.2%. "Arcana" can stack 50 times, and can continue to stack beyond this limit, with the excess stacks removed after dealing DMG.
DMG from "Arcana" ignores 20% of the target's DEF. Only when "Arcana" deals DMG at the start of the enemy target's turn, adjacent targets take 1 additional instance of Wind DoT equal to 198% of Black Swan's ATK.
skill_stages.name: Loom of Fate's Caprice

skill_stages.desc: After Technique is used, there is a 150% base chance for each enemy to be inflicted with 1 stack of "Arcana" at the start of the next battle. For each successful application of "Arcana" on a target, inflicts another stack of "Arcana" on the same target. This process repeats until "Arcana" fails to be inflicted on this target. For each successive application of "Arcana" on a target, its base chance of success is equal to 50% of the base chance of the previous successful infliction of "Arcana" on that target.
skill_stages.name: From Façade to Vérité

skill_stages.desc: When an enemy target gets attacked by Black Swan, there is a 65% base chance of inflicting 5 stack(s) of "Arcana" on them.
skill_stages.name: Viscera's Disquiet

skill_stages.desc:
When an enemy targets enters combat, there is a 65% base chance for it to be inflicted with 1 stack of "Arcana," and a 100% base chance to be inflicted with the DEF reduction effect from the Skill, which lasts for 3 turn(s).
After using Basic ATK or Ultimate, there is also a 100% base chance to inflict the DEF reduction effect from the Skill on the hit enemy targets, which lasts for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Goblet's Dredges

skill_stages.desc: Increases the DMG dealt by all allies by an amount equal to 60% of Black Swan's Effect Hit Rate, up to a maximum DMG increase of 72%.
skill_stages.name: Candleflame's Portent

equip.desc: Just as fireworks can flicker, she too can shift between ten different colors in a minute. When the light show nears its end, she sits high above, regarding the bustling masses beneath her feet with boredom. Thoughts flow and vanish, and slyness circulates across myriad eyes like a dancing kaleidoscope. "I've made my decision. This is how we're going to have fun today!" Bouncing and hopping, she glides through the crowds, her golden-red tail flitting in and out of sight. "Keep up! The brightest fireworks are just about to begin!"
equip.name: Earthly Escapade

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is a submerged city in the marine world Lushaka. The sea level rose to the point where even the city was drowned. Only gigantic "stateships" carrying their sailors chug along across the sea, in search of the direction for their next distant voyage.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Waterscape

ornaments.desc: On the boundless horizon, even the faintest mark can shatter this silence. The navigational lanes bear the history of the crew while the aqua sprites pursue hope along the water currents.
ornaments.name: Lushaka's Twinlanes

ranks.desc: Increases the ATK of ally targets with "Cipher" by 40%. When the battle starts or when using Skill, increases Sparkle's SPD by 15%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Suspension of Disbelief

ranks.desc: Each stack of the Talent's effect additionally reduces the enemy target's DEF by 10%.
ranks.name: Purely Fictitious

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Pipedream

ranks.desc: The Ultimate recovers 1 more Skill Point. The Talent additionally increases the Max Skill Points by 1.
ranks.name: Life Is a Gamble

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Parallax Truth

ranks.desc: The CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill additionally increases by an amount equal to 30% of Sparkle's CRIT DMG. When Sparkle uses Skill, her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost effect will apply to all teammates with "Cipher." When Sparkle uses her Ultimate, any single ally who benefits from her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost will spread that effect to teammates with "Cipher."
ranks.name: Narrative Polysemy

relics.desc: He often sits in the confessional booth listening to the stories. The earrings serve as a constant reminder that even the faintest whispers have their weight.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Melodic Earrings

relics.desc: He often stands in the mansion to greet visitors, countless times making the gesture of invitation. The pristine gloves remind him of observances of humility and courtesy.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Welcoming Gloves

relics.desc: He often stands before the dressing mirror, ensuring his attire is impeccable and his features perfect. Before he leaves the house, he will ensure that everything is meticulously arranged, and no deviations will occur.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Ceremonial Garb

relics.desc: He often chose boots that snugly embrace his feet before embarking on his journeys. Despite numerous falls, he rose each time.
relics.name: Sacerdos' Arduous Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to 100% of Sparkle's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Monodrama

skill_stages.desc:
Increases the CRIT DMG of a designated ally by 24.0% of Sparkle's CRIT DMG plus 45.0%, lasting for 2 turn(s). And at the same time, advances this ally's action by 50%.
When Sparkle uses this ability on herself, the Action Advance effect will not trigger.
skill_stages.name: Dreamdiver

skill_stages.desc: Recovers 6 Skill Point(s) for allies. If Skill Points overflow during recovery, the excess points will be recorded, up to a max of 10 points. When an ally character's turn ends, if Skill Points are below the maximum, Sparkle consumes the recorded value to recover Skill Points until the upper limit is reached. Then, grants all allies "Cipher." For ally targets with "Cipher," each stack of Boost of DMG taken by enemies provided by Sparkle's Talent additionally increases by 6.00%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: The Hero with a Thousand Faces

skill_stages.desc: While Sparkle is on the battlefield, additionally increases the max number of Skill Points by 2. Whenever an ally target consumes 1 Skill Point, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Figment," with each stack increasing the DMG taken by all enemies by 4.0%. This effect lasts for 2 turn(s) and can stack up to 3 time(s).
skill_stages.name: Red Herring

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, grants all allies Misdirect for 20 seconds. Characters with Misdirect will not be detected by enemies, and entering combat in the Misdirect state recovers 3 Skill Point(s) for the team and regenerates 20 Energy for Sparkle.
skill_stages.name: Unreliable Narrator

skill_stages.desc: Using Basic ATK additionally regenerates 10 Energy. When an ally character who holds the CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill consumes Skill Points, Sparkle additionally regenerates 1 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Almanac

skill_stages.desc: If an ally character consumes 3 or more Skill Points in a single turn, Sparkle's next use of Skill will not consume Skill Points.
skill_stages.name: Artificial Flower

skill_stages.desc: Increases all allies's ATK by 45%. When an ally character holds the CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill, All-Type RES PEN increases by 10%.
skill_stages.name: Nocturne

equip.desc: She once loved to seal the moment when plum blossoms were on the verge of wilting and keep them close to her. It has been many years since then. Many lifeforms — rambunctious, sweet, and everything in between — have bloomed from her hands, but the plum blossoms still wilt at their preordained times. It has been many years since then. Her visage in the mirror seems untouched by time. But, in the grand scheme of the cosmos, is she too destined to last for but a fleeting moment? "If all is set for eventual demise, what purpose, then, does creation serve?" After a silence that seems to stretch to eternity, the winds blow, the petals fall, and the reflection in the mirror tenders the same answer as always. "For the day when plum blossoms are no longer kept." She deftly caresses the icy surface of the mirror. Such soliloquies have happened too many times for her to count.
equip.name: Past Self in Mirror

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is Wacq Island, the most well-known island on Planet Vonwacq. Teeming with plant life, the island houses a gigantic tree called Thestang, bearing fruits that would give birth to the various kinds of the island's wildlife.
ornaments.name: Vonwacq's Island of Birth

ornaments.desc: On the coastline of Wacq Island, tidal waves rose and fell... This landscape remained the same for millennia and witnessed the rise and fall of civilizations just like those changing tides.
ornaments.name: Vonwacq's Islandic Coast

ranks.desc: While the Ultimate's Zone is deployed, the DMG dealt by all allies ignores 20% of the target's DEF.
ranks.name: Neuronic Embroidery

ranks.desc: While Ruan Mei is on the field, all allies increase their ATK by 40% when dealing DMG to enemies that are Weakness Broken.
ranks.name: Reedside Promenade

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Viridescent Pirouette

ranks.desc: When an enemy target's Weakness is Broken, Ruan Mei's Break Effect increases by 100% for 3 turn(s).
ranks.name: Chatoyant Éclat

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Languid Barrette

ranks.desc: Extends the duration of the Ultimate's Zone by 1 turn(s). The Talent's Break DMG multiplier additionally increases by 200%.
ranks.name: Sash Cascade

relics.desc: An eyepiece with gold carvings. The lens reflects the wonders from far away to help its owner peer through the illusory dreams.
relics.name: Watchmaker's Telescoping Lens

relics.desc: A wristwatch of fine craftsmanship. It contains a unique watch face and clock hands. It is said to be the symbol of good luck in the Dreamscape.
relics.name: Watchmaker's Fortuitous Wristwatch

relics.desc: A splendid and luxurious formal suit with leather collars. It is magnificent and elegant, usually reserved for formal occasions such as feasts.
relics.name: Watchmaker's Illusory Formal Suit

relics.desc: A pair of elegant leather shoes. The wearer had once stealthily walked upon dreams in an enigmatic form.
relics.name: Watchmaker's Dream-Concealing Dress Shoes

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 100% of Ruan Mei's ATK to one designated enemy target.
skill_stages.name: Threading Fragrance

skill_stages.desc: After using her Skill, Ruan Mei gains Overtone, lasting for 3 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Ruan Mei's every turn. When Ruan Mei has Overtone, all allies' DMG increases by 32.0% and Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50%.
skill_stages.name: String Sings Slow Swirls

skill_stages.desc:
Ruan Mei deploys a Zone that lasts for 2 turns. The Zone's duration decreases by 1 at the start of her turn.
While inside the Zone, all allies' All-Type RES PEN increases by 25.0% and their attacks apply Thanatoplum Rebloom to the enemies hit.
When these enemies attempt to recover from Weakness Break, Thanatoplum Rebloom is triggered, extending the duration of their Weakness Break, delaying their action by an amount equal to 20% of Ruan Mei's Break Effect plus 10%, and dealing Break DMG equal to 50% of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
Enemy targets cannot have Thanatoplum Rebloom re-applied to them until they recover from Weakness Break.
skill_stages.name: Petals to Stream, Repose in Dream

skill_stages.desc: Increases SPD by 10.0% for all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit). When allies Break an enemy target's Weakness, Ruan Mei deals to this enemy target Break DMG equal to 120.0% of her Ice Break DMG.
skill_stages.name: Somatotypical Helix

skill_stages.desc:
After using the Technique, gains Silken Serenade. At the start of the next battle, automatically triggers the Skill for 1 time(s) without consuming Skill Points.
In Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, when Ruan Mei has Silken Serenade, the team actively attacking enemies will always be regarded as attacking their Weakness to enter combat, and this attack can reduce all enemies' Toughness regardless of Weakness types. When breaking Weakness, triggers Weakness Break Effect corresponding to the attacker's Type. For every Blessing in possession (up to a max of 20 Blessings will be taken into account), additionally increases the Toughness Reduction of this attack by 100%. After breaking an enemy target's Weakness, additionally deals to the enemy target Break DMG equal to 100% of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
skill_stages.name: Silken Serenade

skill_stages.desc: Increases Break Effect by 20% for all allies.
skill_stages.name: Inert Respiration

skill_stages.desc: Ruan Mei regenerates 5 Energy at the start of her turn.
skill_stages.name: Days Wane, Thoughts Wax

skill_stages.desc: In battle, for every 10% of Ruan Mei's Break Effect that exceeds 120%, her Skill additionally increases allies' DMG by 6%, up to a maximum of 36%.
skill_stages.name: Candle Lights on Still Waters

equip.desc: "First, overhaul the department's work habits." "Then, strictly implement rewards and penalties." "Of course, the most important part is figuring out everyone's tangled web of personal interests as soon as possible..." Though she was originally here to admire the scenery, her mind had unknowingly drifted toward work, with stress and trouble naturally following. She hurriedly ignites the soothing incense she always carried with her. "The world is so beautiful, yet I am so irritable... Best not to think of such miserable matters while on vacation..."
equip.name: Scent Alone Stays True

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Flamewheel Forge, the location of the Xianzhou Zhuming's Artisanship Commission. A sphere the size of a celestial body, constructed around the progenitor of all heliobi, the Flint Emperor. Ingenious artisans draw energy from it and mold wondrous thoughts and inspirations into form.
ornaments.name: Forge's Lotus Lantern Wick

ornaments.desc: The heliobus progenitor, as grand in scope and size as a star, drowns in an endless dream. As it slumbers, the atoms and molecules around its body clash and spark, endlessly permeating outward from the external shell crafted from the Flamewheel, ultimately appearing as iridescent light bands resembling strands of celestial silk.
ornaments.name: Forge's Heavenly Flamewheel Silk

ranks.desc: Lingsha's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50%. When an enemy unit's Weakness is Broken, reduces their DEF by 20%.
ranks.name: Bloom on Vileward Bouquet

ranks.desc: When using Ultimate, increases all allies' Break Effect by 40%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
ranks.name: Leisure in Carmine Smokeveil

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Shine of Floral Wick

ranks.desc: When Fuyuan takes action, restores HP equal to 40% of Lingsha's ATK for the ally target whose current HP is the lowest.
ranks.name: Redolence from Canopied Banquet

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Poise Atop Twists and Turns

ranks.desc: While "Fuyuan" is on the field, reduces all enemies' All-Type RES by 20%. When "Fuyuan" attacks, additionally deals 4 instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to 50% of Lingsha's ATK and 5 Toughness Reduction to one random enemy. This prioritizes targets with both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness.
ranks.name: Arcadia Under Deep Seclusion

relics.desc: An iron helm that significantly enhances sensory signals, fusing the consciousness of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry together with their armor.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Homing Helm

relics.desc: A powerful iron wristguard that can crush insectoids. It is sharp and light while being hard and sturdy.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Crushing Wristguard

relics.desc: The fiery propulsion armor gives Glamoth's Iron Cavalry a flame hot enough to ignite the battlefield.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Silvery Armor

relics.desc: Mechanical greaves that combine destructive capacities with speed. They allow Glamoth's Iron Cavalry to leap high and concentrate their strength into a kick directed at a single point on the enemy.
relics.name: Iron Cavalry's Skywalk Greaves

skill_stages.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to 110% of Lingsha's ATK to one designated enemy target.
skill_stages.name: Votive Incense

skill_stages.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to 88% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies and at the same time, restores HP equal to 14.8% of Lingsha's ATK plus 467 for all allies. Fuyuan's action advances by 20%.
skill_stages.name: Smoke and Splendor

skill_stages.desc:
Inflicts "Befog" on all enemies. While in "Befog," targets receive 27% increased Break DMG, lasting for 2 turn(s).
Deals Fire DMG equal to 162% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies, and at the same time restores HP equal to 12.8% of Lingsha's ATK plus 400 for all allies. Fuyuan's action advances by 100%.
skill_stages.name: Dripping Mistscape

skill_stages.desc:
When using Skill, summons "Fuyuan," with an initial SPD of 90 and an initial action count of 3.
When taking action, "Fuyuan" launches Follow-Up ATK, dealing Fire DMG equal to 82% of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies. Additionally deals Fire DMG equal to 82% of Lingsha's ATK to one random enemy, and this DMG prioritizes targets that have both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness. Dispels 1 debuff(s) from all allies and restores HP equal to 12.8% of Lingsha's ATK plus 400.
"Fuyuan's" action count can accumulate up to 5. When the action count reaches 0 or when Lingsha is knocked down, "Fuyuan" disappears.
While "Fuyuan" is on the field, using Skill can increase "Fuyuan's" action count by 3.
skill_stages.name: Mistdance Manifest

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, immediately summons Fuyuan at the start of the next battle and inflicts "Befog" on all enemies, lasting for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Wisps of Aurora

skill_stages.desc: Increases this unit's ATK or Outgoing Healing by an amount equal to 25%/10% of Break Effect, up to a maximum increase of 50%/20% respectively.
skill_stages.name: Vermilion Waft

skill_stages.desc: When using Basic ATK, additionally regenerates 10 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Sylvan Smoke

skill_stages.desc: While "Fuyuan" is on the field and any ally character takes DMG or consumes HP, if a character in the team has their current HP percentage lower than or equal to 60%, "Fuyuan" will immediately launch the Talent's Follow-Up ATK against enemies. This does not consume Fuyuan's action count. This effect can trigger again after 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Ember's Echo

equip.desc: "Pitiful, laughable slaves..." The Denizens of Abundance's legions come crashing upon the border like an avalanche, with Lupitoxin rushing toward the Verdant Knights like a tide, trying to arouse the deep-set fear hidden in the soldiers' hearts. Illusions of dread came forth, striking the wills of the warriors, compelling them to drop their blades and be seized by hesitation. But the front remains stalwart like a bronze wall, unstirred by the borisins' disdainful words. From among the soldiers, a single figure saunters forth. She moves her body at a slow pace, and the flags behind her rustle under the unseen killing intent. "The general... it's the general..." "General Feixiao..." "The Merlin's Claw!" These small cheers and calls then come together into a thunderous battle cry. "Always soaring! Forever triumphant!" She stands there, alone. A single figure, but imbued with the might of an entire army.
equip.name: I Venture Forth to Hunt

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Golden Sky Tent belonging to the borisins of Verdantia. Different to the savage name that borisin left in the cosmos, the borisins of Verdantia possess outstanding biotechnology. The children of the wolves gather next to the great Brood Lord Duran, and regard the celestial objects in the sky as their herd as they gallop between the stars.
ornaments.name: Duran's Tent of Golden Sky

ornaments.desc: These were the reins, shackles, and whips. The first thing taught to borisin youths who had grown taller than war beasts' legs was to always grasp the reins tight in their hands, or else the youths themselves would become enslaved livestock — or worse, become feed.
ornaments.name: Duran's Mechabeast Bridle

ranks.desc: After launching "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward," additionally increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by an amount equal to 10% of the original DMG, stacking up to 5 time(s) and lasting until the end of the Ultimate action.
ranks.name: Skyward I Quell

ranks.desc: In the Talent's effect, for every 1 instance of Follow-Up ATK launched by ally targets, Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus." This effect can trigger up to 6 time(s) per turn.
ranks.name: Moonward I Wish

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Starward I Bode

ranks.desc: The Toughness Reduction from the Talent's Follow-Up ATK increases by 100% and, when launched, increases this unit's SPD by 8%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Stormward I Hear

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Heavenward I Leap

ranks.desc: Increases the All-Type RES PEN of Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by 20%. Talent's Follow-Up ATK DMG is considered as Ultimate DMG at the same time, and its DMG multiplier increases by 140%.
ranks.name: Homeward I Near

relics.desc: A face mask modeled after the ferocious bird "Dafeng." With its two pairs of auxiliary eyes, it has witnessed divine miracles.
relics.name: Valorous Mask of Northern Skies

relics.desc: A bionic gauntlet integrated with the body. To hunt fearsome beasts, one must possess claws sharper than those of the beasts themselves.
relics.name: Valorous Bracelet of Grappling Hooks

relics.desc: Like the cold wind, soaring above a pack of wolves with their heads held high. The hunter and the hunted will eventually switch places.
relics.name: Valorous Plate of Soaring Flight

relics.desc: Combat boots fashioned after talons. They allow the wearer to swiftly dash onto the battlefield like the wind, effortlessly traversing through thorns and rugged terrain.
relics.name: Valorous Greaves of Pursuing Hunt

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 110% of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target.
skill_stages.name: Boltsunder

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 220% of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target. Then, immediately launches 1 extra instance of Talent's Follow-Up ATK against the target.
skill_stages.name: Waraxe

skill_stages.desc:
Deals Wind DMG to one designated enemy target, up to 759% of Feixiao's ATK. During this time, can ignore Weakness Type to reduce the target's Toughness. When the target is not Weakness Broken, Feixiao's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 100%.
During the attack, Feixiao first launches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on the target, for a total of 6 time(s). At the end, deals Wind DMG equal to 172% of Feixiao's ATK to the target.
skill_stages.name: Terrasplit

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 64% of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is Weakness Broken, the DMG multiplier increases by 33%.
skill_stages.name: Boltsunder Blitz

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 64% of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is not Weakness Broken, the DMG multiplier increases by 33%.
skill_stages.name: Waraxe Skyward

skill_stages.desc:
Can activate Ultimate when "Flying Aureus" reaches 6 points, accumulating up to 12 points. Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus" for every 2 attacks by ally targets. Feixiao's Ultimate attacks do not count towards this number.
After Feixiao's teammates attack an Enemy target, Feixiao immediately launches Follow-Up ATK against the primary target, dealing Wind DMG equal to 121% of Feixiao's ATK. If there is no primary target available to attack, Feixiao attacks a single random enemy instead. This effect can only trigger once per turn and the trigger count resets at the start of Feixiao's turn. When using this attack, increases DMG dealt by this unit by 66%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Thunderhunt

skill_stages.desc:
After using Technique, enters the "Onrush" state, lasting for 20 seconds. While in "Onrush," pulls in enemies within a certain range, and increases this unit's movement speed by 50%. After entering battle, gains 1 point(s) of "Flying Aureus."
While in "Onrush," actively attacking will start battle with all pulled enemies. After entering battle, deals Wind DMG equal to 200% of Feixiao's ATK to all enemies at the start of each wave. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT. If more than 1 enemy is pulled in, increases the multiplier of this DMG by 100% for each additional enemy pulled in, up to a maximum of 1000%.
skill_stages.name: Stormborn

skill_stages.desc:
When the battle starts, gains 3 point(s) of "Flying Aureus."
At the start of a turn, if no Follow-Up ATK was launched via Talent in the previous turn, then this counts as 1 toward the number of attacks required to gain "Flying Aureus."
skill_stages.name: Heavenpath

skill_stages.desc: When using Ultimate to deal DMG to an enemy target, it is considered as a Follow-Up ATK. Follow-Up ATKs' CRIT DMG increases by 36%.
skill_stages.name: Formshift

skill_stages.desc: When using Skill, increases ATK by 48%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Boltcatch

equip.desc:
The girl hides behind the door and dares not move one step closer. 
Perhaps due to the fact that tonight's objective is already within her reach, her heart is actually beating faster.
"I'm not scared, not scared, not scared..."
In darkness, silence lets out a piercing scream.

The girl is shivering and grasps the "weapon" in her hands tight, but still does not dare to approach the "target."
"There is nothing to be s—s—scared of!"

The tail behind her has finally had enough and suddenly lights up.
"Hurry up. You're just picking up a delivery!"
equip.name: Night of Fright

ornaments.desc: The Xianzhou Luofu floating above the seas of stars was enclosed within the sphere. Skiffs went to and fro through the Jade Gate just like the celestial movements of stars and moons. Countless people had come here to seek the secrets of immortality, only to return in disappointment.
ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Celestial Ark

ornaments.desc: Once, the Luofu reigned supreme over other ships in the Xianzhou fleet due to the grace of the Ambrosial Arbor. Later, when people consumed the cursed fruit of immortality, calamity was brought upon the Luofu by the Ambrosial Arbor, whose vines had already entrapped the Luofu in its firm and inseparable grip.
ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor Vines

ranks.desc: The duration of Divine Provision produced by the Talent is extended by 1 turn(s). When Huohuo possesses Divine Provision, all allies' SPD increases by 12%.
ranks.name: Anchored to Vessel, Specters Nestled

ranks.desc: If Huohuo possesses "Divine Provision" when an ally target is struck by a killing blow, the ally will not be knocked down and their HP will immediately be restored by an amount equal to 50% of their Max HP. This reduces the duration of "Divine Provision" by 1 turn. This effect can only be triggered 2 time(s) per battle.
ranks.name: Sealed in Tail, Wraith Subdued

ranks.desc:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
ranks.name: Cursed by Fate, Moths to Flame

ranks.desc: When healing a target ally via Skill or Talent, the less HP the target ally currently has, the higher the amount of healing they will receive. The maximum increase in healing provided by Huohuo is 80%.
ranks.name: Tied in Life, Bound to Strife

ranks.desc:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
ranks.name: Mandated by Edict, Evils Evicted

ranks.desc: When healing a target ally, increases the target ally's DMG dealt by 50% for 2 turn(s).
ranks.name: Woven Together, Cohere Forever

relics.desc: A withered twig that was used as a hairstick, with new flower buds sprouting on the end. Now, the past is long gone, and the stick inlaid with parcel-gilt flower buds commemorates the beginning of a new life.
relics.name: Passerby's Rejuvenated Wooden Hairstick

relics.desc: Bracers made from flowing coral gold and the leather of unknown beasts. Only master artisans from the Vidyadhara dragon race can create this kind of superior armor.
relics.name: Passerby's Roaming Dragon Bracer

relics.desc: An old coat with a ragged hemline. The embroidery has been ruined by blade marks. Flesh heals quickly, but a coat does not, nor does a person's pain.
relics.name: Passerby's Ragged Embroided Coat

relics.desc: A durable pair of boots that have left shoe-prints on many worlds and have witnessed many lethal situations.
relics.name: Passerby's Stygian Hiking Boots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 55% of Huohuo's Max HP to a target enemy.
skill_stages.name: Banner: Stormcaller

skill_stages.desc: Dispels 1 debuff(s) from a single target ally and immediately restores this ally's HP by an amount equal to 22.4% of Huohuo's Max HP plus 623. At the same time, restores HP for allies that are adjacent to this target ally by an amount equal to 17.9% of Huohuo's Max HP plus 498.
skill_stages.name: Talisman: Protection

skill_stages.desc: Regenerates Energy for all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit) by an amount equal to 21.0% of their respective Max Energy. At the same time, increases their ATK by 43.2% for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Tail: Spiritual Domination

skill_stages.desc:
After using her Skill, Huohuo gains Divine Provision, lasting for 2 turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 turn at the start of Huohuo's every turn. If Huohuo has Divine Provision when an ally's turn starts or when an ally uses their Ultimate, restores HP for that ally by an amount equal to 4.8% of Huohuo's Max HP plus 133. At the same time, every ally with 50% HP percentage or lower receives healing once.
When Divine Provision is triggered to heal an ally, dispel 1 debuff(s) from that ally. This effect can be triggered up to 6 time(s). Using the skill again resets the effect's trigger count.
skill_stages.name: Possession: Ethereal Metaflow

skill_stages.desc: Huohuo terrorizes surrounding enemies, afflicting Horror-Struck on them. Enemies in Horror-Struck will flee away from Huohuo for 10 second(s). When entering battle with enemies in Horror-Struck, there is a 100% base chance of reducing every single enemy's ATK by 25% for 2 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Fiend: Impeachment of Evil

skill_stages.desc: When battle starts, Huohuo gains Divine Provision, lasting for 1 turn(s).
skill_stages.name: Fearful to Act

skill_stages.desc: Increases the chance to resist Crowd Control debuffs by 35%.
skill_stages.name: The Cursed One

skill_stages.desc: When her Talent is triggered to heal allies, Huohuo regenerates 1 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Stress Reaction to Horror

equip.desc: The blade shattered, plunging into the bone-chilling cold. All earthly instruments are mere futilities, their worth discernible with a single glance. "What use do I have of swords?" She holds no attachment, nor does her gaze accommodate anything within. "From now on, I shall be my own sword." To transcend perceived precipices and achieve unprecedented breakthroughs, one must regard themselves as "kindling" to fuel their own fire.
equip.name: I Shall Be My Own Sword

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Aidonia of Amphoreus. Believers of Thanatos have raised colossal monuments on the snow plains, offering tribute to the Holy Maiden who brings them the blessing of death.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deceased Gravestones

ornaments.desc: Animal bones, arrowheads, and caltrops bind the world of the Aidonians with that of the dead. The ascetics of the wastelands only hoped that their souls, unyielding, could pass through the frozen depths, and would not become lost from poverty or weakness on the way to seeing their god.
ornaments.name: Aidonia's Deathward Bone Chains

ranks.desc: When using Ultimate or Enhanced Skill, Jingliu's CRIT DMG increases by 36% for 1 turn(s). Moreover, additionally deals 1 instance of Ice DMG equal to 80% of Jingliu's Max HP to the primary target.
ranks.name: Moon Crashes Tianguan Gate

ranks.desc: After using Ultimate, increases the DMG of the next Enhanced Skill by 80%.
ranks.name: Crescent Shadows Qixing Dipper

relics.desc: A crystal monocle reflecting a grand building, demonstrating its owner's sophistication and erudition along with the cane, bracelet, and brooch.
relics.name: Scholar's Silver-Rimmed Monocle

relics.desc: An exoskeleton crafted from an alloy that aids finger movements, tailored to the user's hand and of significant value.
relics.name: Scholar's Auxiliary Knuckle

relics.desc: Tweed jackets paired with knitwear are a commonplace attire at the academy. For visiting scholars, its durable fabric is an ideal choice.
relics.name: Scholar's Tweed Jacket

relics.desc: These cozy and stylish women's boots have accompanied their owner on polar expeditions for years, being perfectly in-fashion when paired with calf-length pants.
relics.name: Scholar's Felt Snowboots

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 50% of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy.

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 150% of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy and gains 1 stack(s) of "Syzygy."
skill_stages.name: Transcendent Flash

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 150% of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to 75% of Jingliu's Max HP to adjacent targets. Consumes 1 stack(s) of "Syzygy." Using this ability does not consume Skill Points.
skill_stages.name: Moon On Glacial River

skill_stages.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to 180% of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to 90% of Jingliu's Max HP to adjacent targets. Gains 1 stack(s) of "Syzygy" after the attack ends.
skill_stages.name: Florephemeral Dreamflux

skill_stages.desc: When Jingliu has 2 stacks of "Syzygy," she enters the "Spectral Transmigration" state with 1 extra stack of "Syzygy" gained, her action advanced by 100%, and her CRIT Rate increased by 50%. Then, Jingliu's Skill "Transcendent Flash" is enhanced to "Moon On Glacial River," and only this enhanced Skill is available for use in battle. When Jingliu uses an attack in the Spectral Transmigration state, she consumes HP from her teammates equal to 5% of their respective Max HP (this cannot reduce teammates' HP to lower than 1). During the "Spectral Transmigration" state, when ally targets receive DMG or consume HP, Jingliu gains 1 stack of "Moonlight." Each "Moonlight" stack increases Jingliu's CRIT DMG by 44%, stacking up to 5 time(s). Jingliu cannot enter the "Spectral Transmigration" state again until the current "Spectral Transmigration" state ends. "Syzygy" can stack up to 4 times. When "Syzygy" stacks become 0, Jingliu will exit the "Spectral Transmigration" state and remove all "Moonlight." After ally targets receive DMG or consume HP for a total of 20 times, Jingliu gains 1 stack of "Syzygy." Each attack received by each target is only counted once.
skill_stages.name: Crescent Transmigration

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension around this unit that lasts for 20 seconds. All enemies in this Special Dimension will become Frozen. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, Jingliu immediately regenerates 15 Energy and obtains 1 stack(s) of "Syzygy," with a 100% base chance of Freezing enemy targets for 1 turn(s). While Frozen, enemy targets cannot take action, and take Ice Additional DMG equal to 80% of Jingliu's Max HP at the start of every turn. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skill_stages.name: Shine of Truth

skill_stages.desc: While in the "Spectral Transmigration" state, increases Effect RES by 35%, and increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by 20%.
skill_stages.name: Deathrealm

skill_stages.desc: After using "Transcendent Flash," additionally regenerates 15 Energy. And after using "Moon On Glacial River," additionally regenerates 8 Energy.
skill_stages.name: Sword Champion

skill_stages.desc: Upon obtaining "Syzygy," if its stack limit has been reached, Jingliu's next attack ignores 25% of the target's DEF.
skill_stages.name: Frost Wraith

equip.desc:
She had spent many days next to the window.

Flowers were blooming outside when she made gentle medicines with mint and nepeta.
Rain was falling outside when she made strong medicines with mosla and ginger.
Leaves were falling outside when she made sour medicines with peony roots and dry plums.
And snow was falling outside when she made bitter medicines with skullcaps and anemarrhena.

Time flows endlessly, but this window and the person sitting next to it remain forever the same.
equip.name: Time Waits for No One

ornaments.desc: The Xianzhou Luofu floating above the seas of stars was enclosed within the sphere. Skiffs went to and fro through the Jade Gate just like the celestial movements of stars and moons. Countless people had come here to seek the secrets of immortality, only to return in disappointment.
ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Celestial Ark

ornaments.desc: Once, the Luofu reigned supreme over other ships in the Xianzhou fleet due to the grace of the Ambrosial Arbor. Later, when people consumed the cursed fruit of immortality, calamity was brought upon the Luofu by the Ambrosial Arbor, whose vines had already entrapped the Luofu in its firm and inseparable grip.
ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor Vines

Bailu applies Invigoration to allies that are not already Invigorated. For those already Invigorated, Bailu extends the duration of their Invigoration by 1 turn.
The effect of Invigoration can last for 2 turn(s). This effect cannot stack.

After an ally target with Invigoration is hit, restores the ally's HP for 5.7% of Bailu's Max HP plus 160. This effect can trigger 2 time(s).
When Bailu's teammate receives a killing blow, they will not be knocked down. Bailu immediately heals the ally for 19.2% of Bailu's Max HP plus 534 HP. This effect can be triggered 1 time per battle.

skill_stages.desc: When Bailu heals a target ally above their normal Max HP, the target's Max HP increases by 10% for 2 turns.

skill_stages.desc: Invigoration can trigger 1 more time(s).
skill_stages.name: Vidyadhara Ichor Lines

skill_stages.desc: Characters with Invigoration receive 10% less DMG.

equip.desc: A young girl smiles subtly. "How?" "Right here, right now, I am alone..." "But it feels... very lively."
equip.name: In the Night

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the most advanced arena on Planet Taikiyan — the Taikiyan Stadium. The atmosphere is lively both inside and outside the dome as flags wave in the air. With all eyes on the arena, an exciting game of Roboball is about to kick off.
ornaments.name: Taikiyan Laser Stadium

ornaments.desc: The Taikiyan Stadium's standard race track is usually made with a metal structure covered with smooth concrete and natural wooden floors. A large amount of transparent polycarbonate material was used in the construction of the stadium to give the audience an unobstructed view of the games.
ornaments.name: Taikiyan's Arclight Race Track

Enemies in "Butterfly Flurry" will additionally take 1 instance of Quantum Additional DMG equal to 15% of Seele's Ultimate DMG every time they are attacked. When Seele is knocked down, the "Butterfly Flurry" inflicted on the enemies will be removed.

Enters the Amplification state upon defeating an enemy with Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, and receives an extra turn. While in the Amplification state, the DMG of Seele's attacks increases by 88% for 1 turn(s).
Enemies defeated in the extra turn provided by "Resurgence" will not trigger another "Resurgence."
skill_stages.name: Resurgence

skill_stages.desc: After using her Technique, Seele gains Stealth for 20 second(s). While Stealth is active, Seele cannot be detected by enemies. And when entering battle by attacking enemies, Seele will immediately enter the Amplification state.

skill_stages.desc: While Seele is in the Amplification state, her Quantum RES PEN increases by 20%.

skill_stages.desc: After using a Basic ATK, Seele's next action advances by 20%.
skill_stages.name: Rippling Waves

equip.desc: The girl's ears rang in the fantasia with the words conversed on that day. "This sword wasn't hard to pull out at all, Merlin." "Indeed. Becoming the king everyone wishes for won't be hard for you at all, given that I'm guiding you. However, Altria... The hard part is that you can't always meet everyone's expectations." "Then they can choose a more fitting king by that time. I won't protest." "But what if such a person will never exist?" "...Then I'll do my best to meet everyone's expectations." Now, the girl had long since become aware of how profound that tragedy would be. Would she have chosen to give up if she were to return to that moment where everything began? The king does not speak and simply grasps the sword tightly. The stone again gives out a thundering roar as the sword is pulled out.
equip.name: A Thankless Coronation

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is one of Salsotto's last remaining moving cities — Tumbleweed. This city never stopped and barely escaped from a fate of being swallowed up either by the dark night or the midnight sun.
ornaments.name: Salsotto's Moving City

ornaments.desc: Planet Salsotto's own rotation stopped, and thus each cycle of its day and night seemed to last forever. People can only gain the bare minimum space for survival when they ceaselessly migrated and closely chased the ever-moving terminator line.
ornaments.name: Salsotto's Terminator Line

relics.name: Captain's Navigator Hat

relics.desc: A nautical compass that captures the guidance of starlight. Even when adrift in the boundless darkness of the sea, the stars will always point the way forward.

relics.desc: The sailing cloak billowed like a great sail. If the strong winds will not aid me, then I shall become the wind itself.

relics.desc: Shattered waves bloomed beneath the captain's boots. Even if he never returned, the tides would carry back his blessing.

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 110% of Saber's ATK to one designated enemy.
skill_stages.name: Invisible Air: Barrier of the Wind King

skill_stages.desc: Gains 2 point(s) of "Core Resonance" and deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to 165% of Saber's ATK. When this ability is used, if the number of enemy targets is 2 or 1, additionally deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to 165% or 242% of Saber's ATK respectively.

If Saber currently holds "Core Resonance" and her Energy can be fully regenerated by consuming "Core Resonance" after this instance of Skill attack, then increases the multiplier for this instance of Skill. For every 1 point of "Core Resonance," increases the DMG multiplier for this instance of Skill by 15.4%. And after the attack, consumes all "Core Resonance" to regenerate Energy for Saber. Otherwise, immediately gains 3 point(s) of "Core Resonance."

skill_stages.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to 308% of Saber's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals 10 instance(s) of DMG, with each instance being Wind DMG equal to 121% of Saber's ATK dealt to one random enemy. After using Ultimate, the next Basic ATK switches to "Release, the Golden Scepter," and only "Release, the Golden Scepter" can be used.
skill_stages.name: Excalibur

skill_stages.desc: When entering combat, gains 1 "Core Resonance" point(s). When any ally target uses Ultimate, increases the DMG dealt by Saber by 66% for 2 turn(s) and gains 3 "Core Resonance" point(s). For every 1 "Core Resonance" point consumed, regenerates a fixed amount of 8.0 Energy for Saber.

skill_stages.desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, increases Saber's ATK by 35% for 2 turn(s) and gains 2 "Core Resonance."

skill_stages.desc: Increases Saber's CRIT Rate by 20%. When entering combat or when using her Enhanced Basic ATK, gains the "Mana Burst" effect. Under this effect, if Saber has "Core Resonance" and her Energy can be fully regenerated by using her Skill and consuming "Core Resonance," then consumes "Mana Burst" to recover 1 Skill Point for allies, and causes Saber to immediately take action.

skill_stages.desc: Saber can accumulate up to 120 overflow Energy. After using Ultimate, the overflow Energy is cleared and a corresponding amount of Energy is regenerated. When the battle starts, if Energy is below 60%, it is regenerated to 60%.

equip.desc: She leaves the cover of the awning, opens her umbrella, and dives into an alley while humming a lighthearted tune. The rain stops a little while after. She scratches her head and swipes her screen open. After a few taps, raindrops begin to fall in an area no wider than her umbrella. The pitter-patter sound of raindrops on the umbrella mixes with music from the game. All was calm and relaxing. "Gaming and rain totally go together."

ornaments.desc: The IPC's headquarters at Pier Point is sealed within a Planar Sphere. No planet can hide from the grand business plan of the Interastral Peace Corporation. They ventured into deep space to harvest the power of the entire universe.

skill_stages.name: System Warning

skill_stages.desc:
There is a 128% base chance to add 1 Weakness of an on-field ally target's Type to one designated enemy target (prioritizing the implant of a Weakness that matches the first character in the team lineup). This also reduces the enemy target's RES to that Weakness Type by 20% for 3 turn(s). If the enemy target already has that Type of Weakness, the RES reduction effect to that Type will not be triggered.
Each enemy target can only have 1 Weakness implanted by Silver Wolf. When Silver Wolf implants another Weakness to the target, only the most recent implanted Weakness will be retained.
In addition, there is a 100% base chance to further reduce the target's All-Type RES by 13.5% for 2 turn(s).
Deals Quantum DMG equal to 215% of Silver Wolf's ATK to this target.
skill_stages.name: Allow Changes?

skill_stages.desc: Has a 128% base chance to reduce the DEF of all enemies by 46.8% for 3 turn(s). At the same time, deals Quantum DMG equal to 410% of Silver Wolf's ATK to all enemies.

skill_stages.desc:
Silver Wolf can create three types of "Bugs": Reduce ATK by 11.0%, reduce DEF by 13.2%, and reduce SPD by 6.6%.
After every attack launched by Silver Wolf, she has a 108% base chance to implant 1 random "Bug" that lasts for 3 turn(s) in the attacked enemy target. 
When the enemy target gets defeated, the Weakness Silver Wolf implanted on it will be transferred to another surviving enemy on the field that hasn't been implanted with Weakness by Silver Wolf, prioritizing targets at Elite-level and above.
skill_stages.name: Awaiting System Response...

skill_stages.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering combat, deals Quantum DMG equal to 80% of Silver Wolf's ATK to all enemies, and reduces Toughness of all enemies regardless of Weakness Types. Enemies with their Weakness Broken in this way will trigger the Quantum Weakness Break effect.

skill_stages.desc: The duration of "Bug" is extended by 1 turn(s). Every time an enemy's Weakness gets broken, Silver Wolf has a 100% base chance of implanting a random "Bug" on that target.

skill_stages.desc: When the battle starts, immediately regenerates 20 Energy. When Silver Wolf's turn starts, she regenerates 5 Energy.

equip.desc: "Could it be that there's something you haven't told me?" She watches as their neck stiffens, as if a lump is blocking their throat. She knows she is feared, and that no further step is needed. At this point, it no longer mattered what she said. Any word she utters radiates horror... They stand no chance against her, and have no choice but to blurt out what she wants to hear. Like a spider waiting in its web, patience is all she needs.

ornaments.desc: The people of Styxia firmly believe that the sea sirens, just as the legends say, guard their paradise with flesh and blood. And that one day, drawn by the lighthouse's endless cantillation, they will arrive at last, rewarded with an eternal feast.

As promised, he returns at night. The same foxian girl opens the door and smiles at him. "Please follow me, Mr. Benefactor." A ray of moonlight shines onto the base of the etched plate. The artisan had traced the petals with lines of various depths, and he would not be able to see such details without the moonlight. He finally recalls why this item is called "Carve the Moon, Weave the Clouds."

equip.desc:
Looking rather skeptical, the girl thrust the small sword at her imaginary enemy in an attempt to convince herself that this thing was useful.
How can something so feeble compete with my two-handed sword? Do enemies even notice when they get stabbed?

The owner of the sword did not seem to care about its size.
After all, enemies are defeated by strategy, not swords.
It doesn't matter whether the sword is heavy or light, as long as you use the pointy end.
equip.name: Swordplay

Upon reaching 7 or more points of Charge, March 7th immediately takes action and increases the DMG she deals by 48%. Her Basic ATK gets Enhanced, and her Skill cannot be used. After using Enhanced Basic ATK, consumes 7 point(s) of Charge. Charge is capped at 10 points.

equip.desc: In the beginning, it had the exact same pose as the previous portrait. Looking at the face identical to hers, she was convinced that this was not her. "Impossible. How can two portraits be exactly the same?" She tweaked its joints, opened its eyes, and made its fingers softer. She looked happy when all the changes were done. "Completely different from yesterday. This is more like who I am today."
equip.name: The Birth of the Self

ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is one of Salsotto's last remaining moving cities — Tumbleweed. This city never stopped and barely escaped from a fate of being swallowed up either by the dark night or the midnight sun.

ornaments.desc: Planet Salsotto's own rotation stopped, and thus each cycle of its day and night seemed to last forever. People can only gain the bare minimum space for survival when they ceaselessly migrated and closely chased the ever-moving terminator line.

collecting cures and miracles,
and seeking deliverance.
Akin to a vow unbroken, THEIR voyage will be,
ad infinitum.

"You will soon be better than everyone, and that will only be the beginning..."

where occasional treasures lie undiscovered.
THEY sift through the cracks of yesterday, seeking seeds of memory.
...If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead.

When Fu Xuan's current HP percentage falls to 50% of her Max HP or less, HP Restore will be triggered for Fu Xuan, restoring her HP by 80% of the amount of HP she is currently missing. This effect cannot be triggered if she receives a killing blow. This effect has 1 trigger count by default and can hold up to a maximum of 2 trigger counts.

The tally of Blade's HP loss in the current battle is capped at 90% of his Max HP. This value will be reset and re-accumulated after his Ultimate has been used.

When Blade sustains DMG or consumes his HP, he gains 1 stack of Charge, stacking up to 5 times. A max of 1 Charge stack can be gained every time he is attacked.
When Charge stack reaches maximum, immediately launches 1 instance of Follow-Up ATK on all enemies, dealing Wind DMG equal to 65% of Blade's Max HP. At the same time, restores Blade's HP by 25% of his Max HP. After the Follow-Up ATK, all Charges are consumed.

Now on the battle field, the courageous Silvermane Guard captain will defend till the end no matter what — all to find the moment to completely destroy the enemy.

equip.desc:
The flames of karma ignite the plains. The ideals of unknowns turn to ashes, as the ideals of others burn passionately.

The Guardian traverses between bullets and arrowheads.
He can save no one here. He can save everyone here.

Kill one person to save one person. Kill ten thousand to save ten thousand. The fate of trampling over our peers is one part of humanity's continued existence.

The Guardian had already grown used to all this, and his steps never hesitated.
The determination that covers his legs is like wind. The determination that covers his arms is like fire.

He is still seeking a miracle that can bring forth salvation.
equip.name: The Hell Where Ideals Burn
